relics.usage: Gain +20% Command EXP from battles

relics.name: Lost Key
relics.desc: 'Fellas, this key can open the treasure trove lost within the royal city of Kazdel. Hey, green-haired Feline! Watch that hooded slave of yours and keep those hands away from my map!'
relics.usage: Gain +20% Command EXP from battles; obtain 50 Originium Ingots upon reaching Command Level 10

relics.name: Supreme Ring
relics.desc: In Leithanian mythology, he who holds the ring enjoys the vast riches of the entire world, but greed will also be his undoing.
relics.usage: +50% Originium Ingot drops from battle

relics.name: Antique Coins
relics.desc: An ancient, rusty coin, weathered to the point where one can no longer identify its age. Things like these are all too common throughout Terra's barrens.
relics.usage: Immediately gain 10 Originium Ingots.

relics.name: Flawless Jadestone
relics.desc: Even though it thrice brought the city to ruins, it yet shines radiantly in its flawless form. Even today, the Sargonian emperor in possession of the gem has yet to find another piece of jewelry matching its brilliance, leaving it with naught but gunsmoke for a companion.
relics.usage: Immediately gain 25 Originium Ingots.

relics.name: Glass Bird
relics.desc: 'In this paradise of mine, the bird will sing forever and ever.'
relics.usage: Hope +4, Squad Size Limit +1

relics.name: Weird Flute
relics.desc: A weird-looking flute. Someone plays it day in and day out.
relics.usage: Hope +4, Squad Size Limit +1

relics.name: Red Bow Tie
relics.desc: The first present Phantom gave Miss.Christine. She is really fond of it.
relics.usage: Hope +2, Deployment Limit +1

relics.name: Blue Silk Scarf
relics.desc: A lady's elegant scarf. Her appearance is a sign that it is safe here.
relics.usage: Hope +2, Squad Size Limit +1

relics.name: Solo Music Box
relics.desc: An old music box. The music does not play when the box is opened, nor does the figure inside show any signs it is about to move. There is not a peep, and no one is breaking out in dance. Before she begins her performances with Phantom, the lead actress stares blankly into the music box.
relics.usage: Hope +4, Deployment Limit +1

relics.name: Originium Iris
relics.desc: A most extravagant bouquet of flowers. The troupe leader has handed flowers like these to the leads during countless curtain calls.
relics.usage: Hope +6, Squad Size Limit +2

relics.name: Pure Gold Expedition
relics.desc: The regent departed from the wastelands, and markets rose from beneath her dress like sprouts budding in the spring. The road of prosperity connected high mountains and dense forests, following her until she disappeared beyond the cliffs overlooking the western waves. —Ancient Sargon Fairy Tale
relics.usage: Hope +4, Squad Size Limit +1, Deployment Limit +1

relics.name: Osmanthus Goblet
relics.desc: This priceless porcelain cup bears the words 'May the beholder be victorious'. Rumors say a complete set of twelve exist, and a certain collector is missing this last one.
relics.usage: Hope +4, immediately gain 5 Originium Ingots, obtain an extra Collectible when this Collectible is exchanged in Lost and Found

relics.name: Defender-2
relics.desc: A mass-produced defensive drone, oddly effective only in the hands of the enemy.
relics.usage: +3 Objective Shield

relics.name: 'Gaulish Toponym Origins'
relics.desc: A book of historical place names that Mint dug out of the Doctor's office. Calais-Blason is mentioned in the book.
relics.usage: +6 Objective Shield

relics.name: Special Suppressor
relics.desc: An enhanced suppressor developed by Rhodes Island that can better keep the Infected from losing control of their Originium Arts.
relics.usage: +2 Max Life Points, recover 2 Life Points

relics.name: Acahuallan Bowl
relics.desc: Fruit is one of the locals' staples, often eaten fresh right off the tree.
relics.usage: Restore 4 Life Points, +2 Objective Shield

relics.name: Vampire's Bed
relics.desc: A lavish-looking coffin that matches the castle's aesthetics well. However, Warfarin says this is merely a stereotype.
relics.usage: +4 Max Life Points

relics.name: Proof of Longevity
relics.desc:
A tree branch that has withered and flourished.
When it is withered, it grows anew. When it is thriving in its fullest, it fades away yet again.
relics.usage: +6 Max Life Points

relics.name: Three-Dimensional Art Display
relics.desc: The impression that Rhine Lab often gives is akin to this work of art: inscrutable, multi-faceted, and impossible to sift fact from fiction.
relics.usage: Recover 5 Life Points, +2 Max Life Points, and recover 1 additional Life Point after each battle

relics.name: Vanilla Soda
relics.desc: Bolívar's cheap specialty drink dates back hundreds of years. It is mixed with a variety of spices, and is known for not being very good.
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Auto Recovery skills by +0.2/s

relics.name: Dreaming Essence
relics.desc: Supposedly the Banshees make their aromatics only for their beloved. A single drop is enough to enchant just about anyone, bringing out any artist's inspiration and creativity.
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Auto Recovery skills by +0.5/s

relics.name: Victory Horn
relics.desc: Blow the horn, cry out, and scatter our foes with its roar!
relics.usage: Increases the duration of single-instance status effects such as stun, cold, or freeze by 100%

relics.name: Therapy Tape
relics.desc: He tried to stop you from listening. He said it was dangerous. He said you should not stay. Do you understand now? You are listening to his song.
relics.usage: Increases the duration of single-instance status effects such as stun, cold, or freeze by 150%

relics.name: 'Avenger'
relics.desc: A gift from Theresis and set up by Theresa, this is the very first weapon that Ascalon received after her inaugural mission as part of the Military Council.
relics.usage: All enemies take +35% Physical damage

relics.name: 'Brilliant Lament'
relics.desc: His blood yet flows. He has never left this place.
relics.usage: All enemies take +40% Arts damage

relics.name: Military Mirror Armor
relics.desc: This mirror armor used to be able to withstand most attacks to the chest, but with the fall of Gaul, such archaic forms of armor have become museum pieces.
relics.usage: All friendly units have +25% DEF

relics.name: Old Steam Armor
relics.desc: Even this old, outdated steam armor seems to carry with it the resplendence of when the Victorian monarchs cast their glory across half the world.
relics.usage: All friendly units have +35% DEF

relics.name: Emperor's Favor
relics.desc: A very sharp letter opener. It was one of the favorite possessions of the last Ursus emperor, and as such it was very rarely used to actually open letters.
relics.usage: All friendly melee units have +15% ATK

relics.name: Vieux Vanguard's Blade
relics.desc: Prior to its downfall, Gaul first witnessed the sacrifices of its Vieux Vanguards.
relics.usage: All friendly melee units have +35% ATK

relics.name: Necklace of the Presence
relics.desc: Faith hangs ten centimeters above your heart, spoken words flow into your blood, and bullets slide into your magazine.
relics.usage: All friendly ranged units have +15% ATK

relics.name: Damaged Revolver Cylinder
relics.desc: She never capitulated, even after enduring countless trials and tribulations. Her muzzle belched tongues of flame that burned like an angry sun, and the glow above her head was brighter than the daylight itself. Buried here is Outcast, our friend.
relics.usage: All friendly ranged units have +35% ATK

relics.name: Gravity Defying Machine
relics.desc: Nasti Lunorey's magnum opus lifted the Sarkaz from the land that had tormented them for thousands of years. Now, though they float in ethereal clouds, they remain firmly rooted in the sky.
relics.usage: All enemies have -2 Weight

relics.name: Lakebed Aegis
relics.desc: Three decades ago, a child dropped his toy wooden shield into the lake. Three decades later, he bores through the frozen lake, retrieves his shield, and embarks on a hero's journey.
relics.usage: Objective Shield +1; all allied units gain +60% Max HP if you have any Objective Shield at the beginning of a battle

relics.name: Spinach Pack
relics.desc: Many Cautus out there believe that popping the contents of this can into their mouths will grant them immense strength. The marketing's effectiveness is a classic success story in the industry.
relics.usage: All Operators have +60% ATK for one second after their skill becomes active

relics.name: Wrath of Siracusans
relics.desc: The signature pasta dish of an 'authentic Siracusan restaurant' that once operated in the capital of Gaul. The dish's unique taste, and particularly its sauce—a blend of thick chocolate sauce and Originium Slug liver—earned the praise of many Gaulish nobles. Supposedly, though, this dish nearly caused a diplomatic crisis between Siracusa and Gaul.
relics.usage: All Operators have +100% ATK for one second after their skill becomes active

relics.name: Castle's Offspring
relics.desc: With enough time, this box will become a whole new stage.
relics.usage: All Operators have +400 DEF and +30 RES 80 seconds after deployment

relics.name: Timeworn Poetry Strips
relics.desc: 'Drunk far beyond all mounts that list the realm, all beings take on souls as they demand.'
relics.usage: Summons have +30% HP, +30% ATK, and will no longer use Deployment slots

relics.name: Frozen Husk
relics.desc: The warriors of Sami stationed in the Fjal Vetrtonn are often inspired by an illusion: As their life flows toward the earth, their originally frozen bodies become lighter and lighter.
relics.usage: Melee Operators gain ASPD +40 for 5 seconds after taking damage

relics.name: Ancient Fresco
relics.desc: Walk out of the cave, and raise your head. This has never been right, even since antiquity.
relics.usage: When an enemy enters or is freed from Levitation and/or Weightless, they take 1000 Arts damage and are Silenced for 10 seconds

relics.name: Galleria Stellaria's Splendor
relics.desc: At that moment, the light of truth shone onto the earth.
relics.usage: When an enemy enters or is freed from Levitation and/or Weightless, they take 2000 Arts damage and take 30% more damage for 10 seconds

relics.name: Ring of Thorns
relics.desc: You were able to steady yourself while in a distorted fear. There is blood left on the thorns, and you don't know if it was you or the Snowpriest who was pricked by them. They will use whatever means they have, without batting an eye.
relics.usage: When Melee Operators are healed, they and Operators in the adjacent 4 tiles will recover 1 SP

relics.name: Frost Buck's Pauldron
relics.desc: There are no signs of injuries on his body, only a pair of eyes drained of blood and tears.
relics.usage: All allied units gain ATK +40% and DEF +40% for 30 seconds when blocking 2 or more enemies

relics.name: Vinecreep Mortar Gunner
relics.desc: It's no surprise such a fantastical weapon would appear when people from different cultures let down their guard and communicate with sincerity.
relics.usage: Enemies defeated while airborne will deal 5000 Physical damage to surrounding enemies

relics.name: 'Devotion'
relics.desc: Since antiquity, this tribe has believed that they hold a truth about Sami: Everything originally had a voice, until 'It' spoke for all of them.
relics.usage: Ranged Operators deal 300 Arts damage to a random enemy within attack range with every attack or heal

relics.name: 'Unleashings'
relics.desc: After several attempts by Touch, nature briefly opens up to you.
relics.usage: All Operators recover 1 SP every time they take damage or Elemental Injury

relics.name: Royal Brooch
relics.desc: An ornament worn by Gaulish royalty, made from gold and inlaid with expensive Originium crystals. They are more than decoration: many of these brooches hide Originium circuits loaded with defensive Arts.
relics.usage: All allied units have +15 RES, and dodge one instance of damage after deployment

relics.name: String Puppet
relics.desc: The more you struggle and try to break free, the tighter the strings get. Do you really think you are still thinking rationally?
relics.usage: Enemies receive 700 Arts damage per second when stunned, frozen, or bound

relics.name: 'Children's Puppet'
relics.desc: A simple puppet made by Iberian children using trinkets found on the seacoast. Supposedly just holding it tight will give you much richer dreams.
relics.usage: Enemies receive 1400 Arts damage per second when stunned, frozen, or bound

relics.name: Bank of Gaul Check
relics.desc: An extravagant checkbook plated in gold and silver. Can no longer be cashed.
relics.usage: All Operators start with +12 SP

relics.name: Worn-out Group Photo
relics.desc: Do you know someone in the photo?
relics.usage: All enemies have -4% HP and -8% DEF

relics.name: Rosmontis's Embrace
relics.desc: 'Who will be the judge?'
relics.usage: All enemies have -10% HP and -20% DEF

relics.name: 'The Whisperer in Darknight'
relics.desc: A black vinyl. DO. NOT. TOUCH. IT.
relics.usage: All enemies have -10% HP

relics.name: 'Profound Silence'
relics.desc: A painting that depicts the greatest disaster in Iberian history. Its brushstrokes, colors, and images are all meaningless. 'The Ægir know. The Ægir know. The Ægir know.'
relics.usage: All enemies have -20% HP

relics.name: Noxious Hemostatic Agent
relics.desc: 'After fermentation, the body fluids of this Originium slug can be used to stop bleeding.' —'Rhodes Island Wilderness Survival Guide'
relics.usage: All allied units have +20% HP, and Candleguests gain an extra +10%

relics.name: Unknown Instrument
relics.desc: Don't ask. It's for your own good.
relics.usage: All allied units have +50% HP, and Candleguests gain an extra +30%

relics.name: Live Rose
relics.desc: Is it you who nourishes her, or is it she who protects you?
relics.usage: All allied units have +20% healing effectiveness

relics.name: White Flower Crown
relics.desc: A floral veil used in Vampire rituals. Its once vibrant redness has been sucked empty, leaving only a pale white color.
relics.usage: All allied units have +30% healing effectiveness

relics.name: Captain Morgan's Wine
relics.desc: A wine produced in the Iberian region. Despite having gained popularity in the heart of Victoria's bustling cities, it is now discontinued.
relics.usage: +5 Starting SP, increases the SP regen rate of Offensive and Defensive Recovery skills by 1 SP per 3s

relics.name: Water of Life
relics.desc: The strongest Ursine liquors go straight to one's head, but it's said that the healthy Ursine adult can down several bottles.
relics.usage: +7 Starting SP, increases the SP regen rate of Offensive and Defensive Recovery skills by 1 SP per 2.5s

relics.name: Royal Liqueur
relics.desc: The fine wines of the extinct country, Gaul, have now become expensive, prime treasures for collectors. The place of production is now a part of Leithanien, but the technique has been lost.
relics.usage: +7 Starting SP, increases the SP regen rate of Offensive and Defensive Recovery skills by 1 SP per 1.5s

relics.name: 'Numbness and Obscenity'
relics.desc: A famous art piece and the final piece created by an insane Leithanian sculptor two hundred years ago. The sculptor was known for his extraordinary talent and his participation in multiple cruel homicides. However, historical records show that few people took notice of his work. He was instead known for his features and beauty.
relics.usage: All allied units have +5 RES and +10% Arts Dodge

relics.name: Designer's Ruler
relics.desc: Carefully measured with data and experience, those who wear this armor are known to be several magnitudes luckier.
relics.usage: All allied units have +15% Physical Dodge, and gain +30% ATK for 6 seconds after dodging

relics.name: 'Arts Killer'
relics.desc: Considering how Originium Arts and music go hand in hand in Leithanien, it's quite amazing someone came up with the bright idea of combating Arts with noise like this.
relics.usage: All friendly units have +15% Arts Dodge, and gain +30% ATK for 6 seconds after dodging

relics.name: 'Glorious Kazimierz'
relics.desc: A Kazimierzian best-seller that adapts the deeds of the arena's brightest-shining knights into a novel. Nearl, who was exiled but returned to reclaim her laurels, occupies a considerable portion of its pages.
relics.usage: Operators gain +70 ASPD for 15 seconds after dodging

relics.name: 'The Return'
relics.desc: This Kazimierzian best-seller is said to be a collective creation by fans. 'Nearl' has already become an amalgamation of many ideals and fantasies. 'For her, exile was not an escape. She came back, and stood alone against the era's torrents.'
relics.usage: Operators gain +130% ATK for 15 seconds after dodging

relics.name: Celestial Dust
relics.desc: She gently blows away the countless records of sunrises, moonsets, and the changing of the stars. Her life is blown away that easily.
relics.usage: Ranged Operators Levitate all enemies within attack range for 5 seconds when a skill is manually activated

relics.name: 'Blademace'
relics.desc: A sword lodged in a stone. Was someone bored enough to do this?
relics.usage: All Operators have +3 DP Cost, but gain +20% ATK, DEF, and HP

relics.name: Enlistment Order
relics.desc: An enlistment order from the museum collection, issued during the great hunt. It calls for members capable of infiltrating a Feranmut's lair, and attached is a list of names who have signed their lives away.
relics.usage: Operators deployed on the 8 tiles surrounding an Incursion Point gain +100% ATK

relics.name: Geist Binding Rope
relics.desc: Geists do the Sui Regulators' bidding while constrained by these ropes. Be it pouring tea or watering plants, they excel at simple, repetitive work.
relics.usage: Summons have -5 DP Cost, -25% Redeployment Time, and gain +30% ATK

relics.name: 'Ah Meng'
relics.desc: During the calamity of the bestial Sui's awakening a century ago, the Sui Regulators used specially trained beckbeasts to track and eliminate geists. This ceramic sculpture commemorates the beckbeasts' sacrifice.
relics.usage: All enemies take +100% Elemental Damage

relics.name: Evaluation Minister
relics.desc: An assessment support tool developed by Tianshi Bureau apprentices. You don't get anything even if you have the right answers. But when you're wrong... well, best to not even try.
relics.usage: When an allied unit successfully Dodges or Resists damage, the next attack deals +100% damage

relics.name: Borderbound Mirror
relics.desc: Mirrors like these often hung over windows and entrances of the Garden of Grotesqueries. When visitors run into unexpected danger, the realm within a mirror turns into an emergency shelter—until it shatters.
relics.usage: Enemies' damage dealt on their first attack -90%

relics.name: Everlasting Guiding Light
relics.desc: First-timers scaling the mount wield a burning candle to shield their minds from being submerged in the Sui's consciousness. As dark encroaches, the candle burns bright, anchoring their own consciousness on their path back to the present, throughout their long night. This is how they came to be known as 'Candleholders'.
relics.usage: The first deployed Ground Operator gains +50% ATK, status resistance, and 50% Elemental Injury reduction until they are defeated or retreated

relics.name: 'Firefly Booklight'
relics.desc: A plant from a scholar's hometown gradually withers by the academy window, but he cannot bear to dispose of it. The pot is eventually bereft of vegetation, but is surrounded by fireflies illuminating the pages of his books.
relics.usage: When enemies are defeated, surrounding allied units recover 300 HP

relics.name: Toy Slingshot
relics.desc: A bronze slingshot born from the forge. When the rubber band is pulled, small copper companions huddle up into a surprising weighty ball, waiting to be launched. 'Here, have fun. It's not dangerous at all, no, it's just a toy.'
relics.usage: When an Operator uses a skill, deals 30% of ATK as Arts damage to all enemies within Attack Range

relics.name: Snack Basket
relics.desc: A backpack-basket filled with snacks to be sold outside the garden was confiscated at the entrance. The staff awkwardly ask where the items came from, and after you answer honestly, they assure you all is well as they dash in the direction you pointed out with suspicious-looking tools in hand.
relics.usage: All Operators gain +100% natural SP recovery, effect lasts until any Operator manually activates a skill

relics.name: Remnant Spring
relics.desc: What Xian came by and gifted a branch of spring?
relics.usage: Enemies inflict Cold for 6 seconds on surrounding enemies when defeated

relics.name: Walleye
relics.desc: Its consciousness still remains. Its steps stay trapped within the wall. It shields you from wind and calamity, and watches your departure.
relics.usage: Allied Operators take 50% less Physical and Arts damage from sources outside their Attack Range

relics.name: Woodblock Prints
relics.desc: Popular poems engraved on jujube wood. When aloof scholars spot poems they deem inferior circulating amongst the masses, they often scoff and sneer: 'Hmph. What a tragedy, a crime, to waste fine wood like that.'
relics.usage: After Operators use an ammo-type skill, gain +2% ATK every time they deal damage (Stacks to 30 times)

relics.name: Three Feet To All
relics.desc: An ancient Yanese movable type printing press. A noble uses words as weapons, while villains... there was once a time when the printing house discovered the word block for 'not' was stolen right before they went to print a work, and the rebuttal text's meaning changed entirely, leaving one unsure whether to cry or not.
relics.usage: After Operators use an ammo-type skill, +100 ASPD for 15 second

relics.name: 'Yanese Dictionary'
relics.desc: Yan's first ever common dictionary, compiled by a civilian writer after over a decade of work. The editor often sighed over how thin the volumes were despite the amount of text, and dedicated a tomb to rare characters that could not be included or recorded.
relics.usage: When Operators use an ammo-type skill and consume 70% of ammo for the first time, replenishes 30% of max ammo count

relics.name: 'Collection of Elegance'
relics.desc: Yan's first poetry collection containing the most popular poems of the year it was published. Its immense popularity sparked a surge within the masses to copy the poems or write new ones, leading to a shortage of paper and ink.
relics.usage: When Operators use an ammo-type skill and consume 70% of ammo for the first time, replenishes 50% of max ammo count

relics.name: Weave of Thorns and Leaves
relics.desc: Those within this ring receive the favor of the thorns and leaves.
relics.usage: One random deployable Vagary Tile will grant Camouflage to allied units on its surrounding 8 tiles when an Operator is deployed on it

relics.name: Weave of Snow and Soil
relics.desc: Those within this ring receive the attention of the snow and earth.
relics.usage: One random deployable Vagary Tile will grant 1 SP to all allied units deployed on other Vagary tiles when the Operator deployed on the marked tile uses a Offensive Recovery or Defensive Recovery skill

relics.name: Distant Home's Guide
relics.desc: This ancient ring is actually said to be a special navigation device, used to find emergency supplies that the Ægir once secretly stashed in various spots across the ocean. Follow the ocean's currents, be guided by wind; your homeland will always continue to bestow gifts upon you.
relics.usage: One random deployable Vagary Tile will grant the Operator on it 1 SP and 3% HP recovery per second

relics.name: 'A Jade Jue'
relics.desc: A jade pendant gifted by the master of the Garden of Grotesqueries. A friend you happened to make and are traveling with invites you to explore elsewhere, but you politely decline, and his face blinks into a different expression. He tries to pull you by force, only to flinch and withdraw as if scalded by something. You breathe a sigh of relief, and discover the now-cracked pendant on your waist.
relics.usage: Operators on Vagary Tiles defeated for the first time will recover 30% HP instead of retreating

relics.name: Old Sandal
relics.desc: An old straw sandal found under a bridge. The old man atop the bridge was waiting for you to return it, but once you get back, all you see is the other sandal. You mull it over, and recall how you recognize the old man's face from a certain painting...
relics.usage: Summons deployed on Vagary Tiles take -50% Physical and Arts damage, and gain +50% ATK

relics.name: Yi Lock
relics.desc: One of Yi's inventions, used by Ji to rake in a fortune. Both an ornament and education toy, and if you can comprehend its secrets, perhaps you will understand 'Sui' much better.
relics.usage: Two random deployable Vagary Tiles will grant 8 DP when Operators are deployed on them (Can be upgraded in Lost and Found)

relics.name: Complex Yi Lock
relics.desc: A Yi lock, modified by its creator, now much more complicated. How the pieces lock in place no longer make much sense. However, grasp its secrets, and perhaps you will understand 'Sui' much, much better.
relics.usage: Five random deployable Vagary Tiles will grant 10 DP when Operators are deployed on them

relics.name: Mother Cauldron
relics.desc: The nine provinces used nine cauldrons to represent them. As for how these cauldrons were even forged in the first place... 'The Mother Cauldron gave birth to them, duh!' Said a certain film master with a smile.
relics.usage: Operators on Vagary Tiles gain +10% ATK (Can be upgraded in Leisure, to a max of 10 levels)

relics.name: Delicate Bamboo
relics.desc: A young bamboo shoot from Shu's treasured field. An effect sprouts with no cause, and grows a section every time the cycle repeats, until it has ten sections connected to one another, from start to end.
relics.usage: Operators on Vagary Tiles gain +10% HP (Can be upgraded in Leisure, to a max of 10 levels)

relics.name: 'Intro to Weiqi Openings'
relics.desc: Why make that move within this space? The sound on the board ceases, a content game. The match is over... and times have changed.
relics.usage: 3 Broken Fog Machines will randomly spawn on the map on Vagary Tiles

relics.name: Brocade Banner
relics.desc: Legends say the banner was used by the True Lung who ended the Hundred Clan Rebellion. As it waved in the air, hundreds of generals followed its call... But what holds power is not the banner itself. Rather, it's the collective determination of the people to stop war and make peace.
relics.usage: Each time an Operator on a Vagary Tile uses a skill, all other Operators on Vagary Tiles recover 1 SP

relics.name: Dark Red Mask
relics.desc: The mask of an ancient Yanese hero. Records tell of his undying will so strong he even crossed a thousand li and vanquished a thousand foes to stay true to his sworn brotherhood.
relics.usage: All Operators take 50% less damage from enemies blocked by them, and deal 50% more damage to the blocked enemies

relics.name: Elder Mask
relics.desc: The mask of an ancient Yanese hero. This is where the term 'Tianshi' comes from, as his profound wisdom spread to the House of Yan, achieving a millennium of peace before vanishing into thin air.
relics.usage: All enemies blocked by an Operator take 150% of the Operator's ATK as Arts damage every second, and lose 15% hit rate

relics.name: Charcoal Mask
relics.desc: The mask of an ancient Yanese hero. Records tell of his courage and caution, and how his yells could split rivers into two.
relics.usage: Enemies blocked for the first time are inflicted with Fear for 5s

relics.name: Moon-Lady Mask
relics.desc: The mask of a legendary Yanese character. The story of how she shed tears like a river in the search for her husband and flying to the moons has passed down the generations to the present day.
relics.usage: For every enemy blocked, Operators gain 10% Physical and Arts Dodge (Stacks up to 5 times)

relics.name: Broken Wand - Undulation
relics.desc: Tuned to the same frequency; together we'll play the melody.
relics.usage: For every Caster Operator on the field, all allied units deal +12% Arts damage (Stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Blunt Claws - Predation
relics.desc: The pack rumbles with hunger, waiting for a feast.
relics.usage: For every Vanguard Operator on the field, gain 1 DP every 3 seconds (Stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Rusted Blade - Protraction
relics.desc: If the host does not want guests, they'll never reach the door.
relics.usage: For every Specialist Operator on the field, all enemies have -5% Movement Speed (Stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Bend Spears - Rending
relics.desc: Those with power can always help each other to success.
relics.usage: For every Guard Operator on the field, all allied units gain +8% ATK (Stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Fatal Bolts - Succession
relics.desc: Hear the sound of the first arrow, as the last pierces the torso.
relics.usage: For every Sniper Operator on the field, all allied units gain ASPD +12 (Stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Iron Guard - Rampart
relics.desc: Gather sand to form a tower, and gaze upon enemies from above.
relics.usage: For every Defender Operator on the field, all allied units take 10% less Physical damage (Stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Stalwart Aid - Linkup
relics.desc: Hand in hand, shoulder to shoulder, brace yourselves, and look straight ahead.
relics.usage: For every Supporter Operator on the field, increases the SP regen rate of Auto Recovery skills by +0.2/s (Stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Blunt Claws - Proficiency
relics.desc: As operators who are often the first to head into battle, what they have been through is unfathomable.
relics.usage: The SP Cost of Vanguard Operators' skills -35%

relics.name: Blunt Claws - Burst
relics.desc: He's already done all the reserve squad's work for them. What else do you expect?
relics.usage: Vanguard Operators gain +10 Starting SP and +10% ATK

relics.name: Bend Spears - Acuity
relics.desc: 'This is the 7th blade you've broken this month.' 'But I cut down eight enemies this month.'
relics.usage: Guard Operators have +25% ATK

relics.name: Bend Spears - Bloodbath
relics.desc: Soldiers who get bolder as time passes are rare. Most need some form of psychological counseling to alleviate the trauma of war.
relics.usage: Guard Operators restore 2 SP after each attack

relics.name: Bend Spears - Deathmatch
relics.desc: I wouldn't really recommend learning those skills from Blaze.
relics.usage: Guard Operators have -40% DEF, but gain +40% ATK and ASPD +30

relics.name: Iron Guard - Invasion
relics.desc: Defensive actions for the sake of teammates or strategic purposes often make people forget about their original aggressiveness.
relics.usage: Defender Operators have +60% ATK

relics.name: Iron Guard - Consolidation
relics.desc: No matter how heavy fate's blow is, take it.
relics.usage: Defender Operators gain +40% HP, +40% DEF, and +20 RES

relics.name: Fatal Bolts - Precision
relics.desc: In an era when Originium Arts were not as robust as they are now, Yan had a saying, 'a pierced willow leaf from a hundred paces,' to praise others for their mastery of archery.
relics.usage: Sniper Operators have +20% ATK

relics.name: Fatal Bolts - Divine Speed
relics.desc: It is said that the legendary archers of ancient Victoria can almost shoot a continuous stream of arrows.
relics.usage: Sniper Operators have +70 ASPD

relics.name: Broken Wand - Arts Weaving
relics.desc: Those who gaze up at the great spires in Leithanien often see some strange or even celestial phenomena.
relics.usage: Caster Operators have +25% ATK and +25 ASPD

relics.name: Broken Wand - Concentration
relics.desc: 'When a caster intends to go all out, they will display a completely different temperament — even if we're talking about something like Skyfire's grumpiness.'
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Caster Operators by +0.4/s

relics.name: Stalwart Aid - Diligence
relics.desc: Operators tend to give it their all, even to tasks that might seem trivial. The reality is, those tasks are not trivial at all.
relics.usage: The SP Cost of Supporter Operators' skills -40%

relics.name: Healer's Path - Self-Treating
relics.desc: Who says healers can't heal themselves? They simply pop some pills before continuing to help others.
relics.usage: Increases the SP regen rate of Medic Operators by +0.3/s

relics.name: Healer's Path - Keen Hands
relics.desc: Compared to snatching a life from the grip of death, what's three days of coma afterward?
relics.usage: Medic Operators have +50 ASPD

relics.name: Rusted Blade - Advancement
relics.desc: There may be many means, but only one end.
relics.usage: Specialist Operators have -2 DP Cost and +60% HP

relics.name: Rusted Blade - Execution
relics.desc: An endless amount of rust to scrape off, and an endless amount of work.
relics.usage: Specialist Operators have +30 ASPD

relics.name: Rusted Blade - No Man's Land
relics.desc: A shadow blinks, a faint sound stirs, and a life is taken. The audience is the next victim.
relics.usage: The Redeployment Time of Specialist Operators -35%

relics.name: Iron Guard - Moving Fortress
relics.desc: Nobody can break through their defenses, and even fewer are able to escape from their assault. If every combatant has a mission, then that mission is to change the situation on the battlefield the moment they enter the fray.
relics.usage: Defender Operators have +100% ATK, +100% DEF, and +1 Block for 20 seconds after deployment

relics.name: Healer's Path - Wellspring
relics.desc: They are clear springs formed from flowing water, and they heal all that live.
relics.usage: For every Medic Operator on the field, all allies gain Redeployment Time -5% (Stacks up to 8 times)

relics.name: Stalwart Aid - Counter-Arts
relics.desc: There are many ways to weaken an enemy's defensive capabilities: positional devices, armor-stripping Arts, marking weak points, and... giving them a stomachache.
relics.usage: Enemies within the attack range of Supporter Operators have -30% DEF and -30% RES

relics.name: Blunt Claws - Mastery
relics.desc: 'When the darkly-clad enemies rushed towards me, there were only four words on my mind — they are done for.'
relics.usage: For 60 seconds after the start of battle, all Vanguards gain +100% ATK and DEF

relics.name: Blunt Claws - Advancement
relics.desc: Plant a great stone within the waters. Split the waves and part the fog.
relics.usage: Vanguard Operators have -50% DP Cost and gain +60% HP

relics.name: Iron Guard - Advancement
relics.desc: The shieldbearers formed a mountain range and became the earth. What they fight against are not enemies of flesh and blood. They fight against fate and injustice.
relics.usage: Defender Operators have -6 DP Cost and +40% HP

relics.name: Bend Spears - Advancement
relics.desc: The soldiers stepped onto the battlefield, drew their blades, and met in battle.
relics.usage: Guard Operators have -3 DP Cost, gain +40% HP and 15% Physical Dodge

relics.name: Iron Guard - Impenetrable
relics.desc: Every blow they endure will turn into anger and be returned severalfold.
relics.usage: Defender Operators restore 2 SP after being attacked, and Skill SP cost -20%

relics.name: Fatal Bolts - Advancement
relics.desc: Load, aim, and fire. Destruction arrives as scheduled.
relics.usage: Sniper Operators have -2 DP Cost, gain +60% HP and +100 DEF

relics.name: Broken Wand - Advancement
relics.desc: Let Arts dance around your fingertips. Call the wind and rain, unravel reality, and achieve your grand goals.
relics.usage: Caster Operators have -3 DP Cost, gain +60% HP and +10 RES

relics.name: Stalwart Aid - Advancement
relics.desc: Whenever you're 'almost done' with a task, what you need at that moment is someone to help you with the 'almost' part.
relics.usage: Supporter Operators have -2 DP Cost, +40% HP and 15% Arts Dodge

relics.name: Stalwart Aid - Assistance
relics.desc: Proper meals, correct paths, or simply having a heart-to-heart... Victory is won through these little things.
relics.usage: Allied units within the attack range of Supporter Operators gain +30% ATK

relics.name: Healer's Path - Advancement
relics.desc: The desire to save lives is a virtue that mankind must applaud, for that is the support that keeps us alive.
relics.usage: Medic Operators have -2 DP Cost and +60% HP

relics.name: Healer's Path - Restore Sanity
relics.desc: Making one's body as solid as a nomadic city is a bit of a romanticized description, but our medics are ready to put that idea into practice.
relics.usage: Medic Operators have +20% healing effectiveness, and allied units within their attack range gain Resistance

relics.name: Fatal Bolts - Crossfire
relics.desc: The dense crossfire also exposes snipers to great danger. The next battle boils down to a game of vision.
relics.usage: Sniper Operators have +40% ATK

relics.name: Broken Wand - Malediction
relics.desc: It is virtually impossible to identify when the Sarkaz first encountered Originium, and the origins of these ancient Arts have long been separated from actual reality and common sense.
relics.usage: Caster Operators deal +70% Arts damage

relics.name: Antique Casting
relics.desc: 'Harken, the forge of the sky, awaits five earthborn metals'... Even though it can be used for all kinds of work, nobody understands its exact mechanism.
relics.usage: Immediately Promote 3 Operators (Does not require Hope)

relics.name: Rhodes Island Tactical Transceiver
relics.desc: Hang in there, help's on the way.
relics.usage: Gain an additional choice when Recruitment Vouchers are dropped after battle

relics.name: Knight Lance Pro
relics.desc: Don't worry if your own strength isn't enough! Use these tiny levers to move more, and win more in every round! The grand prize is a holiday trip to Sami!
relics.usage: Treasure Chests on the battlefield will drop more Originium Ingots

relics.name: Children of the Walls
relics.desc: The Children of Soil and Stone carefully taught the ancient city of Kazdel how to toughen itself and protect its people behind its walls. With the advent of a protracted peace, it was broken into many little pieces and turned into amulets for adventurers heading into unexplored lands.
relics.usage: Operators deployed on the 8 tiles surrounding the Objective Point gain +2 Block and +50% Max HP

relics.name: Golden Chalice
relics.desc: Saints, knights, and believers. All of them are madmen. Dear God, even the chalice itself is made of pure gold!
relics.usage: For each 5 Originium Ingots in possession, all friendly units have +7 ASPD

relics.name: Slave Hunter
relics.desc: After obtaining Nasti's designs, the Sarkaz put them to use in war right away. They flew into the sky, dominating the Ancients with waves of wrath, and the never-ending war entered a new stage.
relics.usage: Units that become Levitated, Weightless, or are shifted will take 50% more damage for 10 seconds

relics.name: Polar Retrofit Package
relics.desc: Proudly produced by the Volvort Kochinski Extreme Environment Equipment Testing Department. It can modify a variety of devices, adapting them for polar regions and increasing their effectiveness in cold environments.
relics.usage: When used, Support items will also be used simultaneously on the adjacent 4 tiles

relics.name: Northwind Construct
relics.desc: Though she often fails, she is still committed to helping those who would challenge their tragic fates.
relics.usage: When an Apparition enemy deals damage for the first time, inflict Fear on self for 5s

relics.name: Cannot's Mark
relics.desc: Some are willing to do favors for Cannot to maintain good terms, while others deserve the same treatment from Cannot.
relics.usage: When you clear a stage with this Collectible in possession, 60% of your Ingots will be invested into the Prospective Investment System (caps at 60 per run)

relics.name: 'Fist Classics 123'
relics.desc: Shuo's first collection of his thoughts on Kung Fu. It discusses three aspects: first, fist techniques; second, meaning; and third, the pugilist realm itself. It is said the language used is so cryptic that his students could not understand it, so he asked his younger sister for revisions.
relics.usage: Operators gain +5% ATK whenever they use a skill (Stacks up to 40 times)

relics.name: Ink of Dawn and Dusk
relics.desc: Bubbles blown by the fin swimming within this scroll grant strange effects. The scroll's owner doesn't mind if they're touched, for they'll soon burst and vanish into the wind anyway.
relics.usage: When a battle begins, obtain a random Tactical Prop for that battle

relics.name: Chamber of Geists Ledger
relics.desc: Liu'er excitedly invites you to 'try' the Chamber of Geists' newest invention. You decline, citing your tight purse strings, but then you spot her casually scribbling on a ledger. Now, your excuse no longer stands.
relics.usage: The DP Cost of Tactical Props, Summons, and Devices is reduced by 10

relics.name: Training Lightning Rod
relics.desc: Located on the Tianshi Bureau's mountain peak where Tianshis train their Lei Fa. Apprentices always start with the lightning rod until they're familiar with manipulating thunder. Within the Bureau, it also goes by 'Senior'.
relics.usage: Operators gain +0.4/s SP recovery rate whenever they use a skill (Stacks up to 5 times)

relics.name: Fire Poking Stick
relics.desc: The Old Tianshi uses this wooden stick to clean up wicked spirits and overpower Feranmuts, but it spends most days quietly leaning on a kitchen corner wall, only getting picked up to stoke the flames.
relics.usage: Operators' attacks on Apparition enemies deal additional Arts damage equal to 50% ATK

relics.name: Ignited Beastkite
relics.desc: A kite based off a Feranmut. Candles set the ribbons alight, and it always burns, but the kite stays intact. Fly it on a regular day, and borrow its light to gain an extra step when you step into the Sui's consciousness.
relics.usage: Obtain 1 Candle when entering Sui's Remnant Consciousness

relics.name: 'Interdependent Luck'
relics.desc: If you encounter a half-completed poem inside the Garden of Grotesqueries, press this peach wood ornament over it. Minor disasters may be inevitable, but misfortune and fortune are interdependent. Never respond or complete a poem, EVER.
relics.usage: Obtain 1 Coupon when a Risk Coin is added to Coin Coffer

relics.name: Family Stir-Fry
relics.desc: Sky as lid, land as pot, with emotions of all variations sprinkled as seasoning on top. Humanity needs only eat well to live well.
relics.usage: All Operators gain +20% HP and ATK; every Sui's Remnant Consciousness battle cleared increases effects by 10%

relics.name: Rhodes Island Emergency Rescue Vehicle
relics.desc: No matter where your orders may send them—Elite Operators are sure to succeed!
relics.usage: +2 Hope; Receive aid from a random Rhodes Island Elite Operator when fighting in Sui's Remnant Consciousness

relics.name: Wooden Lump
relics.desc: An ordinary geist object, which, as Liu'er says, is a treasure she found on the shores of the eastern. But apart from the warm wooden texture and refreshing, energizing fragrance, there doesn't seem to be anything special about it...
relics.usage: On next visit to Sui's Remnant Consciousness, +2 Candles; Gain 10 Coupons after clearing all Retrieve and Legend nodes

relics.name: Quickbeast Transport
relics.desc: Burdenbeast-drawn vehicles were popular when Yan's Chidao first opened. As the Chidao grew, faster and sturdier vehicles emerged, causing the once-common sight of galloping burdenbeasts to gradually disappear. The thrilling chance of being thrown to the ground at any moment was also slowly forgotten by the masses.
relics.usage: For every Candleguest in your squad, all Candleguests gain +5 ASPD (Stacks up to 10 times)

relics.name: Big Bob's Certificate
relics.desc: 'BIG BOB IS WATCHING YOU.'
relics.usage: For every 3 Ingots owned, +1 Starting DP

relics.name: Round Woodwheel
relics.desc: Round boulders rolling down from the mounts shattered the Catastrophe-formed Originium clusters, providing people with their first inspiration for rapid movement.
relics.usage: +5 Starting DP, with additional +10 for every Vanguard in Squad

relics.name: Duo-Carrier Sedan
relics.desc: A chair and two rods separate people into two classes. Today, most sedan chairs are homed in museums, but how many people hold a desire within to be raised by others, overlooking from above?
relics.usage: +15 cost limit; All Vanguard Operators gain +25% ATK and refund DP when deployed

relics.name: Screeching Blowgun
relics.desc: If blood gets into this blowgun meant for sounding signals and warnings, the screeching, deafening sound it makes when fired sends anyone who hears it running at once.
relics.usage: When an Operator loses 30% HP, inflicts Fear on all enemies within Attack Range for 10s

relics.name: Strange Picky Statue
relics.desc: A shellbeast inside a pond that never does anything when coins are thrown at it. A naughty child throws trash that gets swallowed by the statue, sending the child into tears. The statue then reopens its mouth to spit out pretty pearls, sending the child into high spirits.
relics.usage: Whenever you toss 3 Risk Coins, gain 3 Max Life Points and 3 Objective Shield

relics.name: Varied Fortune
relics.desc: At dawn fowlbeasts cry, the sky a painting. Spring comes, and clouds cover sweet osmanthus. South wind blows winter, frost turned to flowers.
relics.usage: Whenever you toss 3 Flower Coins, gain 8 Originium Ingots and 1 Hope

relics.name: Brewed Realm
relics.desc: Cheap wine, fine liquor, all fine as long as you drink a ladle. Rush like a river, right into the gourd. A whole realm within, its taste's truly unique.
relics.usage: For every Flower Coin in Coffer, all Operators +10% ATK and +20% HP

relics.name: Remnant Flames And Dreams
relics.desc: Thunder bellows a sudden storm as war drums into the sky. Golden infantry rush forth from your dreams.
relics.usage: Gain +15% Command EXP from battles for every Risk coin currently tossed

relics.name: Metal Expedition Drum
relics.desc: A 'veteran' of the army. Once a messenger on the battlefield, it weathered hardships as it witnessed victory and defeat. Today more advanced communication methods have replaced it, but soldiers can still hear the morale-boosting drum beats before they head into battle.
relics.usage: Operators gain +15% ATK with every coin toss (Stacks up to 10 times); if only Risk Coins tossed, adds an extra stack

relics.name: 'Plucked Balance'
relics.desc: When both signs come together, what old tale do they tell?
relics.usage: Melee Operators gain +35% HP and +35% ATK

relics.name: 'Plucked Flower'
relics.desc: When both signs come together, what old tale do they tell?
relics.usage: Melee Operators have +3 DP Cost, but gain +1 Block and +50% DEF

relics.name: 'Plucked Risk'
relics.desc: When both signs come together, what old tale do they tell?
relics.usage: All Melee Operators restore HP equal to 5% of their Max HP every second after deployment for 20s

relics.name: 'Thrown Balance'
relics.desc: When both signs come together, what old tale do they tell?
relics.usage: All Ranged Operators gain +25% HP and +25% ATK

relics.name: 'Thrown Flower'
relics.desc: When both signs come together, what old tale do they tell?
relics.usage: All Ranged Operators +2 DP Cost, but gain 2 layers of Shield when deployed

relics.name: 'Thrown Risk'
relics.desc: When both signs come together, what old tale do they tell?
relics.usage: All Ranged Operators gain status resistance and 15% Arts Dodge

relics.name: 'Seen Balance'
relics.desc: When both signs come together, what old tale do they tell?
relics.usage: When enemies become Weightless, -30% DEF and RES for 10s

relics.name: 'Seen Flower'
relics.desc: When both signs come together, what old tale do they tell?
relics.usage: On skill activation, Operators gain a Barrier equal to 10% of their Max HP that lasts for 10s (Does not stack)

relics.name: 'Seen Risk'
relics.desc: When both signs come together, what old tale do they tell?
relics.usage: Allied Operators deal 50% more Physical and Arts damage to Apparition enemies

relics.name: 'Sui's Balance'
relics.desc: When both signs come together, what old tale do they tell?
relics.usage: Candleguest Operators gain +50% ATK and DEF

relics.name: 'Sui's Flower'
relics.desc: When both signs come together, what old tale do they tell?
relics.usage: All Operators have +3 DP Cost, but Candleguest Operators gain +10% HP, ATK, and DEF for every Candleguest in the Squad

relics.name: 'Sui's Risk'
relics.desc: When both signs come together, what old tale do they tell?
relics.usage: Candleguests gain 100% ATK for 10s after deployment, duration increased by 5s for every Candleguest promoted via combat (Can be increased up to 15 times)

relics.name: Ink of the Hidden Butterfly
relics.desc: A creature researched by Liu'er, made from remnant rock of the Sui Tomb and martial tomes panned by Shuo. Originally Sui was carved on it, but Its form has faded, and now a butterfly is carved to take Its place. But the butterfly fears the Sui's might, so it is time to repel the Sui to appease it.
relics.usage: When carrying this Collectible, 'Body of Sui' will raid your party in battles

relics.name: Carved Inkstick Remnant
relics.desc: A butterfly rests on the edge of the inkstick, and 'words' emerge from its multitude of layers. The missing sections are no longer readable, but the radicals and shapes of the other characters imply longing for a relative.
relics.usage: Every battle, a random Operator will have their DP Cost reduced to 0. When carrying this Collectible, can choose to lead expedition in a different direction in Prophecy

relics.name: Cloud & Paint
relics.desc: There are right and wrong moralities just as weiqi stones has black and white, but the Feranmut hardly cares. Change the realm with a cunning plan typed on paper, but you still require the Sui's will to enter the Tomb of Sui.
relics.usage: Operators lose 2% of Max HP for 60 seconds on deployment; Leads expedition in a different direction

relics.name: Unflinching Masterplan
relics.desc: A square piece of wood, boasting a weiqi board on the top and a movable type plate on the back, perfectly supporting one another. The type cannot be used, for a block with 'Ji' and 'Ye' carved can be seen protruding, making it impossible for the frame to be pressed down.
relics.usage: Operators lose 50% SP on deployment; When carrying this Collectible, a special Operation option will appear in Pathfinder

relics.name: Unsealed Case
relics.desc: A box Yi left in the Sui's Remnant Consciousness. Name and decorations lost, bereft of carvings or markings.
relics.usage: Leader and Elite enemies gain +30% DEF and +20 ASPD; every Statuegeist remaining on the field when the stage ends will deplete 1 Life Point (min 1); wondrous effects in Scout nodes

relics.name: Inkless Scroll
relics.desc: Humanity and Sui opened the box with their shared memories, and the long scroll searches for traces of where ink could have been.
relics.usage: +3 Hope, Dreadful Foe nodes in Jianzi Shrine will be more difficult; leads expedition in a different direction

relics.name: Memory Scope
relics.desc: Created by Sui proxies for the purpose of fighting the bestial Sui. In its endless spinning, the myriad possibilities of Its awakening are revealed, allowing Wang to plan ahead.
relics.usage: When obtained, lose all Originium Ingots and Hope, and gain -50% Command Level EXP and Originium Ingots from battle. Special function in Wander into Wonderland

relics.name: 'Little Moji'
relics.desc: Inkgeist fed with the Sui proxies' memories. Its movements are not particularly swift, but it assists with suppressing Sui's awakening consciousness in the infinite possibilities.
relics.usage: Reduce natural DP regeneration rate by 50%, leads expedition in a different direction. Special function in Tavern

relics.name: Merciless
relics.desc: Strange object created when depicting the bestial Sui. Sui will not allow others to trample upon Its vessel, even if It has yet to awaken. Its body instinctively searches for premonitions of change.
relics.usage: All enemies HP and DEF +50%; 'Olden Pride' and some 'Body' segments gain ability to continuously summon enemies

relics.name: Ceaseless
relics.desc: Strange object created when depicting the bestial Sui. Sui will not allow others to peruse Its memories and thoughts, even if It has yet to awaken. The extension of sensation staunchly obstructs all change.
relics.usage: All enemies ATK +30%; [Candleguests] and their summons -10% ATK and HP when fighting outside Sui's Remnant Consciousness, plus extra -10% upon entering a new floor, and extra -50% when entering 'Laiqu Point'

relics.name: 'Civilight Eterna'
relics.desc: A small, black crown.
relics.usage: All enemies take +150% True damage

relics.name: Gallopbeast Chariot
relics.desc: A box with two wheels pulled by four gallopbeasts is surely faster than mortals walking on their own two legs—Is that so? Just look at the Khagan's Nightzmora troops. A chariot traveling at full speed still cannot keep up with how fast Terra develops.
relics.usage: +30 cost limit, when DP is at 99 or higher, all units gain +50% HP and +1 Block

relics.name: Rampart Burdenbeast
relics.desc: Stalwart warriors spread out and surround people gathered on burdenbeast backs as they journey toward a paradise free from any Catastrophes. This was the first 'nomadic city'.
relics.usage: +15 cost limit, when DP is at 99 or higher, enemies on the surrounding 12 tiles around an Objective Point lose Invisibility and have -35% hit rate

relics.name: 'Little Baizao'
relics.desc: A crystallization of war, Originium, and suffering.
relics.usage: When an Operator is deployed, all enemies take True damage equivalent to a certain percentage of DP used; if 30 or more DP used, also inflicts Stun for 5s

relics.name: 'Cangtong'
relics.desc: Lin Qingyan's sword makes no sound when unsheathed, its branch-like appearance concealing its true form. Drape thunder over, and it will surely cleave through wind and blaze, reaching its target in an flash.
relics.usage: When DP reaches 99 or higher, all enemies take 3000 Arts damage and are Stunned for 2s every 10s

relics.name: 'End of Times'
relics.desc: As long as a new cycle has not been reached, there is still time to fix your mistakes.
relics.usage: For one time only, if you would fail any battle other than the final battle of the area or a Leader battle, you instead gain +1 Life Point and advance to the next step instead of concluding the exploration

relics.name: Coin Geists
relics.desc: Eight coins turned into one geist, but they retain their own minds. Even when one grabs the thread binding them together, they may stay defiant.
relics.usage: When the battle begins, randomize all allied Operators' Deployment Cost

relics.name: Four Corners Paint
relics.desc: Dusk's special mix of pigments that also serves as her seal. When a brush is dipped into the palette, the four colors fuse and form into a scene.
relics.usage: For one time per battle, an Operator deployed with 4 Operators already on the field will gain +50% HP, +50% DEF, and +5 Block

relics.name: Four Seasons Brush
relics.desc: Dusk's specially created brush that also serves as her seal. When she puts brush to parchment, the four seasons stay as-is.
relics.usage: For one time per battle, an Operator deployed with 4 Operators already on the field will gain status resistance, +50% ATK, and take 50% less Elemental Injury

relics.name: Soldier Shadow
relics.desc: This shadow puppet was created to honor a soldier who defended the city. Legends say they led a party in a border defense for a hundred days, and when the city fell, they stood on its walls before the sands swallowed them up. When Yumen city was built, a commemorative state was also made.
relics.usage: Every time the rightmost Operator from the Deployment Waiting Zone is deployed, all deployed Operators gain a Barrier scaled to DP spent

relics.name: Craftsman Shadow
relics.desc: This shadow puppet was created to honor a skilled artisan who dedicated their life to pursuing perfection. Villains coveted their skills, but not even money or physical suffering made them waver, only hoping their skills would remain unscathed. They later died in a bandit's den, and their works set alight, never to be passed down to further generations.
relics.usage: Every time the leftmost Operator from the Deployment Waiting Zone is deployed, all deployed Operators gain 100% of the DP spent as SP

relics.name: Artist Shadow
relics.desc: This shadow puppet was created to honor a legendary dancer. Legends tell of summoning mighty waves out of a river, and the beauty of spring drawn from forests with their dances. They dedicated their life to dance, but with age became injured and retired, leaving the mortal realm soon after. Countless dancers have copied their movements, but none have quite made it. What a shame.
relics.usage: The leftmost Operator in the Deployment Waiting Zone gains +10 Starting SP, +30 ASPD, and +30% ATK

relics.name: Merchant Shadow
relics.desc: This shadow puppet was created to honor a legendary merchant. They once assembled a caravan of civilians to trade goods between cities in Catastrophe-prone areas, meeting the towns' urgent needs. When the Chidao was finally completed, they perished in an accident.
relics.usage: The rightmost Operator in the Deployment Waiting Zone gains +2 Block, +50% DEF, +50% Max HP, and refunds half the DP spent after deployment

relics.name: Deepwater Talisman
relics.desc: The Sui Regulator trusts you, and approved your application to bring more Operators into the garden. Though, just as a creekfin enters a new river with caution, they hope newcomers will understand the importance of staying sharp.
relics.usage: In Garden of Grotesqueries, the first combat node on every floor will drop an extra Recruitment Voucher, Recruitment Voucher conservation limit +1

relics.name: Three-Legged Goldfowl
relics.desc: The legs of this strange auspicious figure apparently refers to the two-sided coins of prosperity and decline, life and death, and flourish and decay; whichever leg touches a person first grants eternal blessing in that aspect. According to Sui Regulator research, while this creature appears to resemble a fowlbeast, it's unfortunately...
relics.usage: Upon acquisition, doubles one of the following resources randomly: Ingots, Hope, or Objective Shield

relics.name: Raidian's Handheld Console
relics.desc: Stuffed with many carefully designed mini-games. You can always see a trace of the equipment Raidian uses daily in the protagonists, but no sign of her herself.
relics.usage: For every Summon on the field, all Summons gain +100 ATK and DEF (Stacks up to 10 times)

relics.name: Bells of Agreement
relics.desc: After the inauguration ceremony, the new Candleholder went to meet his seniors—bells woven together with rope, with different techniques and colors—and after listening to the crisp bell chimes, the Candleholder ties a new link.
relics.usage: For every Candleguest promoted via combat, all Candleguests +40% ATK; after deployment, -4% Redeployment Time and gain 4 DP (Stacks up to 4 times)

relics.name: Tzu-Wu Blade
relics.desc: An object condensed from the first Acute Hour of Sui, shaped as a weapon. With combat as whetstone, one can see keen fury within.
relics.usage: Reveals all Turmoil nodes on the current or next Sui's Remnant Consciousness visit; grants -5% Redeployment Time to all Operators, and gains 1 stack for each completed Turmoil node, up to 6 stacks

relics.name: Wu-Shang Shuttle
relics.desc: An object condensed from the seventh Acute Hour of Sui, shaped as a shuttle. With links and weaves, one can see layered anxiety within.
relics.usage: Reveals all Trade nodes on the current or next Sui's Remnant Consciousness visit; Trade nodes will offer discounted goods, and buying all stock in a shop grants a free chance to refresh stock

relics.name: Shen-Chu Wheel
relics.desc: An object condensed from the ninth Acute Hour of Sui, shaped as a wheel. With curiosity as forge, one can see optimistic escapism within.
relics.usage: +1 Hope, +3 Ingots, reveals all Leisure nodes on the current and next Sui's Remnant Consciousness visit; wondrous effects in some Leisure nodes

relics.name: Hai-Shih Stove
relics.desc: An object condensed from the twelfth Acute Hour of Sui, shaped as a stove. With myriad bestial Sui deeds and mortal disputes all on the same land, why differentiate between the two?
relics.usage: Wondrous effects in Retrieve nodes; +2 Candles after clearing all Retrieve nodes (only triggers once)

relics.name: Yin-Shih Flask
relics.desc: An object condensed from the third Acute Hour of Sui, shaped as a flask. With tales as wine, one can see unrestrained freedom within.
relics.usage: +2 Hope, reveals some Legend and Decision nodes on the current or next Sui's Remnant Consciousness visit; wondrous effects in some Legend nodes

relics.name: Wei-Chien Rule
relics.desc: An object condensed from the eighth Acute Hour of Sui, shaped as a rule. With knowledge of construction, one can see obstructive amiability within.
relics.usage: +6 Ingots; wondrous effects in Tavern nodes

relics.name: Great Tomb Whistle
relics.desc: A wood whistle crafted from the Great Tomb Tree. When blown, one's consciousness drifts away from the body, while the whistle turns into fuel to light a steady fire inside the mind.
relics.usage: After leaving this shop, immediately enter Sui's Remnant Consciousness and gain +3 Candles

relics.name: Smoky Candle
relics.desc: An ash candle created from the Hall of Candles's fireworks. It dissipates when lit, but with the past seen in the fleeting smoke, it lights an eternal flame within one's heart.
relics.usage: Turns an Operator into a Candleguest

relics.name: Scout's Scope
relics.desc: Lock on, aim, fire, and destroy the enemy's will to resist, all in the name of a better future that Scout will never see. Maybe you can do it for him.
relics.usage: Enemies take increased damage from allied units as range increases (max 100%)

relics.name: Great Banshee's Veil
relics.desc: The former Lord of the Banshees always seemed amicable, as if that were her only side... until she pulled out her bone pen, sang softly, and impaled agonizing wails into the minds of every intruder.
relics.usage: All enemies take +10% Arts damage and +50% Elemental Injury

relics.name: Disaster's Origin
relics.desc: The Sarkaz dug through the Targangils Prime Vein and Originium crystals spurted forth from Kazdel. Their fall was inevitable, so they wanted everything on this great land to be buried together with them.
relics.usage: All enemies take +20% Arts damage and +100% Elemental Injury

relics.name: Pure White Dance Shoes
relics.desc: The Ursus dancer's steps are swift and elegant, her body moving as she wills.
relics.usage: Can deploy Ranged Operators on Low Ground tiles

relics.name: Ribbon of Honor
relics.desc: Numerous actors have played this character, yet none of them were able to save the character's dearest friend.
relics.usage: All allied units have +100% ATK when blocking only 1 enemy

relics.name: Survivor Contract
relics.desc: A very long contract, in which every term and condition is the result of experience, leaving no room for chance or sentiment. Satisfy them all to be the final survivor.
relics.usage: At the start of battle, a random Operator gains +20% ATK and DEF, plus an additional +20% at the end of each victorious battle

relics.name: Four-Leaf Clover Fossil
relics.desc: A symbol of luck that Magallan found in a place all but devoid of life. The rock has no doubt experienced many violent changes of the lands, but it survived, giving those who come across it a small bit of lingering hope.
relics.usage: Gain an additional choice when a Collectible drops from a Wish Fulfilled node or after battle

relics.name: Fearless Blade
relics.desc: Before Kazdel's gates he stood, an impregnable bulwark. Gaulish artilleries, Leithanian casters, and Victorian Knights all took their shots at him. Yet, even when the gates fell and the coalition retreated, the Goliath did not yield an inch.
relics.usage: When the battle begins, the Operator with the highest DP Cost gains +50% ATK and DEF

relics.name: Godmother's Token
relics.desc: A laurel of bones, the token of Signora Sicilia. This symbol of order will smooth the turbulence of all desires, for conflict is not allowed. Genuine or counterfeit, it still demands you to kneel.
relics.usage: All enemy units have -17% ATK

relics.name: Fissured Restraints
relics.desc: It seems this sturdy band was once used to restrain something terrifying... Help...
relics.usage: All enemy units have -7% ATK

relics.name: Living Woodplate
relics.desc: Shamans know the formidable will to survive that trees possess, so when a warrior has a similar will, they invite the trees to be their armor.
relics.usage: All allied melee units gain a Barrier equal to 50% of their Max HP on deployment

relics.name: Snow Doe's Glove
relics.desc: She shoots the last three arrows in her quiver at the Frozen Monstrosity, who used them to end her life.
relics.usage: All allied units gain ASPD +80 and obtain 50% Physical and Arts Dodge for 30s when blocking 3 or more enemies

relics.name: Roundstone Altar
relics.desc: An offering made is returned with a reward. So simple it was, that people never questioned what they were sacrificing to.
relics.usage: Chance to permanently increase all allied units' ATK and DEF by 5% after a victorious battle (Stacks up to 10 times)

relics.name: Black Tulip
relics.desc: Silence crushed the Iberians, so she knows she must speak up. If her words aren't sharp enough, her sword will speak for her.
relics.usage: Allied Operators gradually gain ATK when not using a skill, up to a maximum of +60% after 60s; bonus is reset when skill ends

relics.name: Emergency Stimulant
relics.desc: An injection commonly used in Rim Billiton's local mines. Its strong active ingredient can stimulate the workers' senses and ensure their work efficiency in extreme environments. When life and their project both present their deadlines, sometimes the choice is simpler than one might think.
relics.usage: Operators gain ASPD as their HP decreases, up to +60 ASPD at 30% HP

relics.name: Old George's Nutri-Paste
relics.desc: This poor-tasting fortified nutritional supplement was originally a 'dietary supplement' periodically provided to Columbian Pioneers, but after extensive marketing, it suddenly became a 'beauty product' beloved by nobles.
relics.usage: Operators gain ATK as their HP increases, up to +30% ATK at 100% HP

relics.name: Broken Wand - Absorb
relics.desc: Consume the defeated as nourishment, and embark on an eternal path to victory.
relics.usage: Caster Operators recover 2 SP every time they deal damage to an enemy unit

relics.name: Iron Guard - Advance
relics.desc: In exchange for an opportunity to attack, the shattered ranks made one more advance.
relics.usage: Defender Operators inflict Bind on all nearby enemies lasting 1s every 2s, and deal True damage equal to 100% of their ATK

relics.name: Court Striking Block
relics.desc: The brother of a certain judge made this piece of wood for her so that she would have something to smash when annoyed by obstinate criminals, allowing her to vent her frustration while also intimidating the courtroom.
relics.usage: Allied Operators +10% HP for each Balance Coin in Coffer (max +150%)

relics.name: Blaze's Chainsaw
relics.desc: She drags herself into hell with her enemies, appraising each other's determination with heat. She has never failed.
relics.usage: Enemies take increased damage from allied units as distance is reduced (max 100%)

relics.name: Sawblade Bangle
relics.desc: Surprise is the key to victory in close quarters.
relics.usage: Operators have ATK +50% when blocking

relics.name: Old Millstone
relics.desc: The beast that pulled the millstone was whipped, the man who pushed the millstone was berated, but it was the millstone that broke first. Now it turns by itself, whenever it hears a sound.
relics.usage: Operators +6 ASPD after taking damage (Stacks 10x)

relics.name: Crowing Rooftop Figure
relics.desc: The rooftop figure's call announces the time at the Garden of Grotesqueries. The staff put a great deal of effort into it so it can take flight quickly and let out a cry that reaches every corner of the garden.
relics.usage: Allied Operators gradually gain ASPD when not using a skill, up to a maximum of +40 after 40s; bonus is reset when skill ends

relics.name: Heaven Axe
relics.desc: A lumberjack who lost his way in the Garden of Grotesqueries managed to cut a way through to Jianzi Shrine with nothing more than a blunt axe and sheer force of will. This old fellow, who hadn't the faintest idea what consciousness of the Sui even was, was later 'hired' as a staff member, and Yi added the axe he no longer needed to his collection.
relics.usage: Operators +60% ATK and HP, but -30% ATK and HP whenever you enter Sui's Remnant Consciousness (Stacks 2x)

relics.name: Yarn of Real and Unreal
relics.desc: Yarn that Yi collected, which Ji is loath to use. After the real and unreal threads were tidied up, it was tossed into a corner of the Garden of Grotesqueries for the beasts to toy with.
relics.usage: Operator DEF +600 and RES +15 when there are other Operators in the 8 surrounding tiles

relics.name: Silk Knot
relics.desc: Yi's wedding gift to a staff couple, made to unravel when either is unfaithful. The couple left a long time ago, but nothing has changed with the knot.
relics.usage: Operator Max HP +40% when there are other Operators in the 8 surrounding tiles

relics.name: Fragment of Ju's Order
relics.desc: A piece of Ju's strange body, now part of the Baizao Museum collection. It was withdrawn from display and put into storage after a group of tourists marched out of the exhibition hall in perfect unison after viewing it.
relics.usage: Operator ATK +50%, bonus lost when skill is activated manually

relics.name: Fragment of Hou's Soil
relics.desc: A piece of Hou's heavy body, once part of the Baizao Museum collection. It disappeared when the exhibition hall turned into a garden; perhaps the Feranmut has already become one with this newborn corner of nature.
relics.usage: When an Operator on a Vagary Tile uses a skill, all Operators +40% ATK for 30s

relics.name: Victory Guqin
relics.desc: Only a brave warrior who came back from battle can make a sound with it. Each battle forms a music score that is preserved for commemoration. The body of the zither is red after hundreds of battles, but the music of victory lingers.
relics.usage: Allied Operators' ATK +15%, extra +5% whenever Life Point(s) lost (Stacks 17x)

relics.name: 'Panacea'
relics.desc: The doctor developed this recipe to soothe the patient's pain and anxiety, giving them more time to tackle the root of the ailment. However, patients often believe it to be a miracle cure because it makes their pain vanish.
relics.usage: Operator +1200 DEF and +30 RES when affected by negative status (Cold, Frozen, Stun)

relics.name: Waking Tower
relics.desc: The Hour of Sui is inexorable, but Liu'er came up with this tower that changes the Hour of Sui, with the help of the Sui proxies.
relics.usage: Awakens an Hour of Sui

relics.name: Coin Platter
relics.desc: If you are going to toss a coin, it had better make a sound. Created for such a purpose, this plate has somehow become one of the most discerning coin connoisseurs in the land.
relics.usage: +1 Hope on Flower Coin toss; +4 Ingots on Balance Coin toss; +1 Life Point on Risk Coin toss

relics.name: Little Ba'jie Sticker
relics.desc: Sticker of the Garden of Grotesqueries mascot, often sold in a set with Tongbao. Sometimes throws out its friends that want to leave the Coin Coffer.
relics.usage: Chance to toss extra Tongbao

relics.name: Soldier's Edge
relics.desc: Every member of the Imperial Guard is the product of both skill and luck. The same is true of their weapons.
relics.usage: Allied Operators +10% ATK for each Balance Coin in Coffer (max +150%)

relics.name: King's New Lance
relics.desc: Beautiful wishes made in dire straits can bring hope, even if they are not necessarily the truth.
relics.usage: All allied Operators have +50 ASPD when at 1 Life Point

relics.name: King's Armor
relics.desc: There used to be many golden display cases placed before the palace gates and in the square, displaying all sorts of treasures to admire. But now, it hurts just to think about such sights.
relics.usage: +3 Objective Shield, coverts all Life Points into Objective Shield, and -1 Life Point and +1 Objective Shield at the end of battle

relics.name: King's Legacy
relics.desc: Grow up and face reality. Arm yourself with tenacity and confidence, while showing your friends tolerance and grace.
relics.usage: When at 1 Life Point, all Operators recover additional 1 SP and 3% of Max HP every 2s

relics.name: King's Crown
relics.desc: O Nameless Kings, may you continue to bless Iberia, even though your kingdoms are no more.
relics.usage: All Operators gain +40% ATK when at 1 Life Point, or +80% if you have 3 or more King's Collectibles

relics.name: Sarkaz King's Regal Rest
relics.desc: For those in this position, a peaceful sleep becomes eternal
relics.usage: All Operators gain +20% DEF and +10 RES when at full Life Points

relics.name: Sarkaz King's Torn Banner
relics.desc: For those in this position, to struggle is to inevitably fall.
relics.usage: All Operators gain +50 ASPD when at full Life Points

relics.name: King of Sarkaz's Vessel
relics.desc: For those in this position, prosperity is but an illusion.
relics.usage: All Operators gain +60% Max HP when at full Life Points, or +120% if you have collected 3 or more King of Sarkaz's Collectibles

relics.name: Hand of Buckler
relics.desc: Drop by drop, bit by bit. It is unstoppable.
relics.usage: Decel Binder, Hexer, and Abjurer Operators' attacks deal additional Arts damage equal to 3% of the target's current HP

relics.name: Hand of Predation
relics.desc: Herds stir, flesh rend asunder.
relics.usage: Pioneer, Charger, and Tactician Operators gain +10% ATK and DEF on every skill activation (Stacks 10x)

relics.name: Hand of Rending
relics.desc: Mountains shatter, stones devoured.
relics.usage: Reaper, Soloblade, and Fighter Operators ignore 70% of the target's DEF

relics.name: Hand of Undulation
relics.desc: Blasts conquer, the wake deafening.
relics.usage: Splash Caster, Chain Caster, and Mech-accord Caster Operators recover 2 SP each time they deal damage to an enemy unit

relics.name: Hand of Protraction
relics.desc: Protracted battles, a home of carnage.
relics.usage: Ambusher, Merchant, and Geek Operators gain +25% ATK for every 30s they remain on the battlefield (Stacks 5x)

relics.name: Hand of Fireworks
relics.desc: Bang! Boom! A pleasant surprise.
relics.usage: Marksman, Loopshooter, and Sentry Protector Operators have a 25% chance when an attack hits to shoot an extra projectile, dealing 200% ATK as AoE Physical Damage

relics.name: Pried Open Toolbox - α
relics.desc: The tool box of the troupe's prop master. From nails to dummy props, it has everything.
relics.usage: Hope +4, immediately gain 3 Originium Ingots

relics.name: Pried Open Toolbox - β
relics.desc: The tool box of the troupe's prop master. From nails to dummy props, it has everything.
relics.usage: Hope +4, immediately gain 4 Originium Ingots

relics.name: Pried Open Toolbox - γ
relics.desc: The tool box of the troupe's prop master. From nails to dummy props, it has everything.
relics.usage: Hope +4, immediately gain 5 Originium Ingots

relics.name: Banshee's Kiss - α
relics.desc: Outbloods show exceptional courage when in possession of this trinket, but to Logos, a rare male Banshee, it's just a common object.
relics.usage: Hope +7, immediately gain 8 Originium Ingots

relics.name: Banshee's Kiss - β
relics.desc: Outbloods show exceptional courage when in possession of this trinket, but to Logos, a rare male Banshee, it's just a common object.
relics.usage: Hope +8, immediately gain 8 Originium Ingots

relics.name: Banshee's Kiss - γ
relics.desc: Outbloods show exceptional courage when in possession of this trinket, but to Logos, a rare male Banshee, it's just a common object.
relics.usage: Hope +10, immediately gain 8 Originium Ingots

relics.name: Universal Key - α
relics.desc: An old, silver key. It can open any door. As the keeper, the troupe's butler naturally needs a key that unlocks all the secrets here.
relics.usage: Hope +6, Objective Shield +1

relics.name: Universal Key - β
relics.desc: An old, silver key. It can open any door. As the keeper, the troupe's butler naturally needs a key that unlocks all the secrets here.
relics.usage: Hope +7, Objective Shield +2

relics.name: Universal Key - γ
relics.desc: An old, silver key. It can open any door. As the keeper, the troupe's butler naturally needs a key that unlocks all the secrets here.
relics.usage: Hope +7, Objective Shield +3

relics.name: Seaweed Salad - α
relics.desc: Once a beloved Iberian delicacy, now fading from memory due to the rampaging Seaborn.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +1, all allied ranged units gain +5% ATK

relics.name: Seaweed Salad - β
relics.desc: Once a beloved Iberian delicacy, now fading from memory due to the rampaging Seaborn.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +1, all allied ranged units gain +8% ATK

relics.name: Seaweed Salad - γ
relics.desc: Once a beloved Iberian delicacy, now fading from memory due to the rampaging Seaborn.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +1, all allied ranged units gain +11% ATK

relics.name: Orange Storm - α
relics.desc: A Mama John's candy. The orange flavor, cheap and delicious, is a best-seller among children.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +1, all allied melee units gain +5% ATK

relics.name: Orange Storm - β
relics.desc: A Mama John's candy. The orange flavor, cheap and delicious, is a best-seller among children.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +1, all allied melee units gain +8% ATK

relics.name: Orange Storm - γ
relics.desc: A Mama John's candy. The orange flavor, cheap and delicious, is a best-seller among children.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +1, all allied melee units gain +11% ATK

relics.name: Coffee Plains Coffee Candy - α
relics.desc: Dossoles' famous coffee-flavored candy product. Has real caffeine added, to keep you wide awake from clock-in to overtime.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +2, all allied ranged units gain +6% ATK

relics.name: Coffee Plains Coffee Candy - β
relics.desc: Dossoles' famous coffee-flavored candy product. Has real caffeine added, to keep you wide awake from clock-in to overtime.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +2, all allied ranged units gain +9% ATK

relics.name: Coffee Plains Coffee Candy - γ
relics.desc: Dossoles' famous coffee-flavored candy product. Has real caffeine added, to keep you wide awake from clock-in to overtime.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +2, all allied ranged units gain +12% ATK

relics.name: Screaming Cherry - α
relics.desc: A Mama John's candy. Though the niche vinegar-pickled cherry flavor can't compete with the best-sellers in popularity, it has garnered a small group of loyal supporters. Rumor has it that one of Mama John's directors loves this flavor.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +2, all allied melee units gain +6% ATK

relics.name: Screaming Cherry - β
