relics.desc: A Mama John's candy. Though the niche vinegar-pickled cherry flavor can't compete with the best-sellers in popularity, it has garnered a small group of loyal supporters. Rumor has it that one of Mama John's directors loves this flavor.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +2, all allied melee units gain +9% ATK

relics.name: Screaming Cherry - γ
relics.desc: A Mama John's candy. Though the niche vinegar-pickled cherry flavor can't compete with the best-sellers in popularity, it has garnered a small group of loyal supporters. Rumor has it that one of Mama John's directors loves this flavor.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +2, all allied melee units gain +12% ATK

relics.name: Antiquated Sheet Music - α
relics.desc: A tattered piece of sheet music. The notes can no longer be clearly read. No one knows for certain what story this piece was meant to tell.
relics.usage: Hope +3, all allied ranged units gain +6% ATK

relics.name: Antiquated Sheet Music - β
relics.desc: A tattered piece of sheet music. The notes can no longer be clearly read. No one knows for certain what story this piece was meant to tell.
relics.usage: Hope +3, all allied ranged units gain +8% ATK

relics.name: Antiquated Sheet Music - γ
relics.desc: A tattered piece of sheet music. The notes can no longer be clearly read. No one knows for certain what story this piece was meant to tell.
relics.usage: Hope +3, all allied ranged units gain +10% ATK

relics.name: Letter of Termination Contract - α
relics.desc: You can break free from this troupe with just one signature.
relics.usage: Hope +4, all allied melee units gain +3% ATK

relics.name: Letter of Termination Contract - β
relics.desc: You can break free from this troupe with just one signature.
relics.usage: Hope +4, all allied melee units gain +5% ATK

relics.name: Letter of Termination Contract - γ
relics.desc: You can break free from this troupe with just one signature.
relics.usage: Hope +4, all allied melee units gain +7% ATK

relics.name: Pitt's Assorted Fruits - α
relics.desc: With rich taste and affordable prices, Pitt's assorted fruit candies rival Mama John's in the sweets market. Muelsyse's favorite.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +3, all allied units gain +4% ATK, DEF, and HP

relics.name: Pitt's Assorted Fruits - β
relics.desc: With rich taste and affordable prices, Pitt's assorted fruit candies rival Mama John's in the sweets market. Muelsyse's favorite.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +3, all allied units gain +5% ATK, DEF, and HP

relics.name: Pitt's Assorted Fruits - γ
relics.desc: With rich taste and affordable prices, Pitt's assorted fruit candies rival Mama John's in the sweets market. Muelsyse's favorite.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +3, all allied units gain +7% ATK, DEF, and HP

relics.name: Featured Canned Meat - α
relics.desc: For travelers on a long journey, the convenience of 'ready to eat' is often more important than taste.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +1, all allied units recover 5 HP per second

relics.name: Featured Canned Meat - β
relics.desc: For travelers on a long journey, the convenience of 'ready to eat' is often more important than taste.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +1, all allied units recover 8 HP per second

relics.name: Featured Canned Meat - γ
relics.desc: For travelers on a long journey, the convenience of 'ready to eat' is often more important than taste.
relics.usage: Squad Size Limit +1, all allied units recover 10 HP per second

relics.name: Topographical Map - α
relics.desc: A hand-drawn map exuding antiquity. The labels and terrain are enlarged, and its scale seems to be off.
relics.usage: Deployment Limit +1, all allied units gain +5% DEF

relics.name: Topographical Map - β
relics.desc: A hand-drawn map exuding antiquity. The labels and terrain are enlarged, and its scale seems to be off.
relics.usage: Deployment Limit +1, all allied units gain +6% DEF

relics.name: Topographical Map - γ
relics.desc: A hand-drawn map exuding antiquity. The labels and terrain are enlarged, and its scale seems to be off.
relics.usage: Deployment Limit +1, all allied units gain +8% DEF

relics.name: Conch of Divine Whispers - α
relics.desc: Sound it, and gods you've never seen or even heard of will answer your call. Actually, it's just a hollow conch shell.
relics.usage: Deployment Limit +1, all allied units gain +5% HP

relics.name: Conch of Divine Whispers - β
relics.desc: Sound it, and gods you've never seen or even heard of will answer your call. Actually, it's just a hollow conch shell.
relics.usage: Deployment Limit +1, all allied units gain +6% HP

relics.name: Conch of Divine Whispers - γ
relics.desc: Sound it, and gods you've never seen or even heard of will answer your call. Actually, it's just a hollow conch shell.
relics.usage: Deployment Limit +1, all allied units gain +8% HP

relics.name: Night-Whispers in the Forest - α
relics.desc: A Convalescent Garden aromatherapy set for field operators, featuring fifteen herbal extracts in a hundred and seventy-two combinations. Said to evoke the soothing sense of rustling leaves and gentle chirping.
relics.usage: Deployment Limit +2, all allied units gain +7% DEF

relics.name: Night-Whispers in the Forest - β
relics.desc: A Convalescent Garden aromatherapy set for field operators, featuring fifteen herbal extracts in a hundred and seventy-two combinations. Said to evoke the soothing sense of rustling leaves and gentle chirping.
relics.usage: Deployment Limit +2, all allied units gain +8% DEF

relics.name: Night-Whispers in the Forest - γ
relics.desc: A Convalescent Garden aromatherapy set for field operators, featuring fifteen herbal extracts in a hundred and seventy-two combinations. Said to evoke the soothing sense of rustling leaves and gentle chirping.
relics.usage: Deployment Limit +2, all allied units gain +10% DEF

relics.name: Church Alms Meal Voucher - α
relics.desc: In the declining coastal towns of Iberia, certain churches will provide alms in the form of meals, which their believers can redeem using vouchers. As for how these vouchers are distributed, that is a secret.
relics.usage: Deployment Limit +2, all allied units gain +7% HP

relics.name: Church Alms Meal Voucher - β
relics.desc: In the declining coastal towns of Iberia, certain churches will provide alms in the form of meals, which their believers can redeem using vouchers. As for how these vouchers are distributed, that is a secret.
relics.usage: Deployment Limit +2, all allied units gain +8% HP

relics.name: Church Alms Meal Voucher - γ
relics.desc: In the declining coastal towns of Iberia, certain churches will provide alms in the form of meals, which their believers can redeem using vouchers. As for how these vouchers are distributed, that is a secret.
relics.usage: Deployment Limit +2, all allied units gain +10% HP

tools.name: Support Replenishment Station
tools.desc: An emergency Portable Supply Station provided to field operators.
tools.usage: Bring a Portable Supply Station along to each battle

tools.name: Support Landmine Set
tools.desc: An emergency set of Interference Mines provided to field operators.
tools.usage: Bring 3 Interference Mines along to each battle

tools.name: Support Mr. Boom
tools.desc: An emergency Mr. Boom provided to field operators.
tools.usage: Bring 2 Mr. Booms along to each battle

tools.name: Support Escape Crane
tools.desc: An emergency Snowsant's Safe Escape Crane provided to field operators.
tools.usage: Bring 2 Snowsant's Safe Escape Cranes along to each battle

tools.name: Support Riot Pile
tools.desc: An emergency set of Riot Piles provided to field operators.
tools.usage: Bring 2 Riot Piles along to each battle

tools.name: Support Fog Machine
tools.desc: An emergency Fog Machine provided to field operators that appears to be broken.
tools.usage: Bring a Broken Fog Machine along to each battle

bands.name: Leader Squad
bands.usage: +4 Max Life Points, recover 1 additional Life Point after each battle. Start with 'End of Times'

bands.name: Special Squad
bands.usage: Squad Size Limit +2, Deployment Limit +2; start with Raidian and 5 Rhodes Island Reserve Operators recruited

bands.name: Support Squad
bands.usage: Start with +20 Originium Ingots, +2 Hope, and Tongbao 'Cocoon Worth'

bands.name: Tactical Assault Squad
bands.usage: 4-star or above Guard and Vanguard Operators cost 1 less Hope to recruit and promote; Operators from first recruitment will already be promoted and Recruitment Vouchers are more likely to appear in shops

bands.name: Tactical Fortification Squad
bands.usage: 4-star or above Defender and Supporter Operators cost 1 less Hope to recruit and promote; Operators from first recruitment will already be promoted and Recruitment Vouchers are more likely to appear in shops

bands.name: Tactical Ranged Squad
bands.usage: 4-star or above Medic and Sniper Operators cost 1 less Hope to recruit and promote; Operators from first recruitment will already be promoted and Recruitment Vouchers are more likely to appear in shops

bands.name: Tactical Destruction Squad
bands.usage: 4-star or above Caster and Specialist Operators cost 1 less Hope to recruit and promote; Operators from first recruitment will already be promoted and Recruitment Vouchers are more likely to appear in shops

bands.name: High Ground Breaching Squad
bands.usage: All Caster, Sniper, Medic, and Supporter Operators above 4-star cost 2 less Hope to recruit

bands.name: Ground Breaching Squad
bands.usage: All Vanguard, Guard, Defender, and Specialist Operators above 4-star cost 2 less Hope to recruit

bands.name: First-Class Squad
bands.usage: When Recruiting for the first time, gain a random Advanced Recruitment Voucher; 4 & 5-star Operators will already be promoted when recruited

bands.name: Tourist Squad
bands.usage: Coin coffer size +2, +4 Coupons; coins tossed +3. Start with 'Flower-Beacon Tower'

bands.name: Sui Regulator Squad
bands.usage: Recruitment Voucher conserve limit +3, gain 2 random Conserved Recruitment Vouchers upon entering a new floor until limit reached. +2 Hope when entering Pathfinder

bands.name: Tianshi Bureau Squad
bands.usage: +2 Candles when entering Sui's Remnant Consciousness, can enter Sui's Remnant Consciousness through Safe House nodes, and get Collectibles whenever all Retrieve, Legend, Doubts or Turmoil nodes are completed

bands.name: Blooming Flowers Squad
bands.usage: Life Points spent in Plan nodes fixed at 1; When tossing coins, 1 or more Flower Coins will grant +1 Coupon; Start with Tongbao 'A People United'

bands.name: Perilous Game Squad
bands.usage: When 1 or more Risk Coins are tossed, Treasure Chest is more likely to appear in Combat and Emergency Ops; Start with 'Interdependent Luck' and Tongbao 'Dream of Curio'

bands.name: Sui's Shadow Squad
bands.usage: 4-star or above Caster and Supporter Operators cost 1 less Hope to recruit and 1 less Hope to promote; Operators from first recruitment will already be promoted and corresponding Recruitment Vouchers are more likely to appear in shops

bands.name: Proxy Squad
bands.usage: Extra choice when entering some non-combat nodes. Chance to give +1 to Hope, Max Life Points, Coupon limit, or Originium Ingot when entering non-combat or Doubts nodes

bands.name: Knowledge Squad
bands.usage: When Recruiting for the first time, gain a random Top Operator Recruitment Voucher; Top Operator Rec. Voucher becomes purchasable. Start with 'The Ascent'

bands.name: Merchant Squad
bands.usage: Gain 3 Originium Ingots when exchanging Tongbao. Rogue Trader are guaranteed to appear with vertical paths, and Rogue Trader prices are reduced by 50%. Start with 'Tactile Token'

endings.name: Orderly Placation
endings.desc: The Garden of Grotesqueries's Placation ceremony is repeated year after year, and the duties of the Candleholders passed on from generation to generation. Like the garden, this finely honed sword shall seal the bestial Sui in its prison.
cond: Prerequisite: none (default ending)
Play through areas 1–5 without any special branch.
Achieved by winning the Dreadful Foe 「The Suppression of Sui」 at the end of area 5 (「A Change of Fate」 in emergency form), on any difficulty.

endings.name: Scroll of Scars
endings.desc: One is missing from the twelve. What he saw in the hall does not remain, but the message lingers: She is not gone.
endings.change: Perhaps someone will show you the path of history from past to present with this inkstick.
cond: Prerequisite: complete any ending once → unlocks the collectibles 「Ink of the Hidden Butterfly」 and 「Carved Inkstick Remnant」.
Step 1 — at the encounter 「Butterfly of Elm」, either pay 30 Originium Ingots, or spend all your Ingots on 'Take her along' → 'Give it a try' → obtain 「Ink of the Hidden Butterfly」.
Step 2 — keep playing while holding 「Ink of the Hidden Butterfly」 to obtain 「Carved Inkstick Remnant」 (while held, you are attacked by Sui's body during battles).
Step 3 — while holding 「Carved Inkstick Remnant」, choose 'Raise the stele' at the Prophecy 「Memorial Hall Entrance」 → the exploration's ending changes.
After clearing the area 5 Dreadful Foe, continue into area 6 instead of ending the exploration, and win the final battle 「Words Past Like Smoke」 (「Near-Forgotten」 in emergency form).

endings.name: Black-White Abstrusity
endings.desc: The Placation ceremony was introduced to the Tomb of Sui, just as other events set into action by man, but it was Wang who laid the groundwork. To what end does his game of chess lead?
endings.change: You have fallen into Wang's game.
cond: Prerequisite: complete Ending 2 「Scroll of Scars」 → unlocks the collectibles 「Cloud & Paint」 and 「Unflinching Masterplan」.
Step 1 — at the encounter 「A Game of Weiqi」, choose 'Flip the board' → 'Take the board' → obtain 「Unflinching Masterplan」.

Step 2 — while holding 「Unflinching Masterplan」, an extra option appears at the guide node 「Hall of Candles」 — pick it to enter a special battle; win to obtain 「Cloud & Paint」 (the exploration's ending changes).
After clearing the area 5 Dreadful Foe, continue into area 6A and win the showdown with the King, 「The Sui Strategist」.

endings.name: Out of Nothingness
endings.desc: After having witnessed a facet of the great wild hunt within the Sui's consciousness, the wordless scroll leaves a shallow blot of ink. From this, it can turn into words, to books, to teachings, to people.
endings.change: You have broken the barriers of reality and the consciousness of the Sui.
cond: Prerequisite: after Expansion I, complete any ending once → unlocks the 'Unsealed Chest' and the 'Inkless Scroll'.
Step 1 — at the first Rogue Trader you enter in the run, buy the 'Unsealed Chest' from the first shelf for 5 Objective HP.

Step 2 — while holding the chest, an extra option to have it opened appears at the Scout node 「Lamp-Holders and Candle-Wielders」 — pick it, let one Operator enter the scroll, then choose 'What's inside?' → obtain the 'Inkless Scroll'.
After clearing the area 5 Dreadful Foe, continue into area 6B and win the final battle 「The Last Hunt」.

endings.name: No Regrets
endings.desc: With the token of the proxies' future entrusted to humanity as they leave the Tomb, Wang can now give his full focus to extinguishing all of Sui's wild fantasies within the finite infinite.
endings.change: With Wang's strategies, you cut through the rebirth of Sui, the flames of destruction, and the imagination of proxies.
cond: Prerequisite: after Expansion II, complete any ending once → unlocks the collectibles 「Memory Scope」, 「'Little Moji'」, 「Merciless」, and 「Ceaseless」.
Step 1 — at the tavern 「Finishing Touch」, choose to dip the brush and create a piece (costs up to 5 max Objective HP) → obtain 「Memory Scope」.

Step 2 — while holding 「Memory Scope」, an extra option to gaze at the piece appears at the strange space 「Suppressing the Earth」 — pick it to enter the special battle 「Recorded Memory」; win to obtain 「'Little Moji'」.
Achieved by winning the final showdown 「Stasis」 (selectable difficulty) beyond the Garden — 「Defining the World」 is the empowered version on the same route.

encounters.title: Natural Redoubt
encounters.desc: The Garden of Grotesqueries contains examples of every scenic sight you might see in Yan, so naturally that includes a place as remote and rugged as this. A moment of carelessness will send you plummeting off the cliff to your doom. To step on this road requires only courage, but to pass requires luck as well.

next.desc: You'll be able to save a lot of time going this way. Even if there are Durins trying to barge past you, so long as you walk true and look neither forward nor back, there is nothing to worry about.

The rugged path has become utter chaos with the addition of photographers and Durins. The reason why old folks always say 'rough roads are hard to cross' is because narrow spaces are natural haunt spots for geists. The slightest hint of trouble can leave them with a mighty bloodthirst.
The mission comes first. You look down into the bottomless ravine, then silently leave.

choices.title: Don't look down
choices.desc: Encounter a special battle, obtain extra rewards depending on how many enemies fall into pits

choices.title: Look up ahead!
choices.desc: Encounter a special and dangerous battle, obtain extra rewards depending on how many enemies fall into pits

choices.title: I'm real lucky
choices.desc: Have at least 2 Flower Coins, obtain a random Recruitment Voucher

encounters.title: Duck Guardian
encounters.desc: This Ursus only ever says he's here on his boss's business, and refuses to answer any other questions. Doesn't matter who his boss is, or if he even has one, he shouldn't be loitering in the Garden.

choices.title: Kick him out
choices.desc: Who said visitors couldn't see each other out?

next.desc: You give him a big hint, but he doesn't move. You start moving his legs for him, and he raises a fist.
You start with the pushing right away, so he raises his fist right away.

Being able to stay in the Garden at a time like this probably means he has some obscure connection to the imperial court or Yi himself. Since he refuses to leave no matter what, then if he's attacked by geists, it's not your problem.

choices.title: Bring it on
choices.desc: Encounter a special and dangerous battle

encounters.title: Nimble Perro Thief
encounters.desc: This Perro keeps trying to cry his eyes out on the down-low, but that doesn't stop his hands and feet from being mighty nimble. Something's off, real off!

next.desc: He runs as soon as you look at him. He must've stolen something from the Garden!
Everything has its reason, but some reasons... aren't worth knowing. Curiosity killed the Feline and all, y'know.

choices.title: Run!
choices.desc: Encounter a special and dangerous battle

encounters.title: Rotund God of Wealth
encounters.desc: Why is someone trying to get people to sign up for his investment scheme in the Garden of Grotesqueries... and why's he trying to get the geists in on it?! What the hell does this Zalak think he's doing?!

choices.title: Take him in
choices.desc: Save it for the Judicial Review Office, buddy!

next.desc: The Zalak seems to know what he's up to isn't in line with the Laws of Yan, so he calls for his bodyguards.
There's definitely a big crime syndicate behind him, so you give him a down payment, preparing to pull them out by the roots. Shame that when he brought you to an Ursus guy, your scheme was exposed.
Even if it did work out for him, where was he going to hawk his goods? Best not get involved in stuff that might end up complicated.

choices.title: Where did these people come from?
Take them all in!
choices.desc: Encounter a special and dangerous battle

choices.title: I'd like a freebie
choices.desc: Have Raidian in your squad, recover 3 Life Points

encounters.title: Ducking Emperor
encounters.desc: A duck swims amidst statues, artifacts, and geists, going on and on about his 'grand' dream of transforming this place into the most popular tourist spot ever: more entertainment facilities, more singers and dancers and actors, and even more interactive stuff... This really is...

choices.title: What's he trying to say?
choices.desc: Haven't defeated Duck Lord or his underlings, gain 3 random Collectibles and 10 Coupons

choices.title: 'Nice to finally meet'cha', duck
choices.desc: Defeated Duck Lord and his underlings 1-5 times

next.desc: You've run into the duck's underlings before, and you've seen how easily he lies to the people here. You can't let him escape.

choices.title: Pretty reasonable once you think about it
Nab 'em all!
choices.desc: Encounter a special and dangerous battle

choices.title: Don't let any of them get away
choices.desc: Defeated Duck Lord and his underlings 6 times

next.desc: Oho, the duck's lackeys are all here too, alongside a bunch of geists running amok. Time to settle all our debts, here and now. None of them are getting away.

encounters.title: She Witnesses
encounters.desc: Here, a life-sized statue of an Anasa is enshrined, her bearing solemn, her eyes shut tight. In front of the statue, there is a delicate sacrificial altar, adorned with an incense burner and several varieties of fruit, all alluring.

next.desc: The noise you make as you eat the offering rouses the 'statue', and the Anasa Bodhisattva sees your shameful behavior as soon as she opens her eyes. She smiles without anger as she waves her hand, sending a gust of black wind to scoop you up. Only once you have received your punishment will you be able to leave.

choices.title: Stretch out to take the statue's crown

next.desc: Despite your riches, you still yearn for even rarer things. You climb up on the altar, unable to stop your obsession with the gleaming crown. But as your hand arcs through the air, the 'statue' awakens. She grabs your arm, then tosses you into a black wind soon after. You cannot tell where you are or where you are headed, the only sound you can hear a stern voice by your side: 'The greedy must be punished!'

Whether Anasa Bodhisattvas or Tianshis of Yan, all worthy of being immortalized as a statue are erudites of profound learning. You respectfully pray for a blessing, then leave. Not long after, the 'statue' languidly awakens, dropping to the floor to stretch her limbs. After finishing her lunch atop the 'sacrificial altar', she returns to her bed to continue her contemplation.

choices.title: Let me out!
choices.desc: Encounter a special and dangerous battle

encounters.title: Yaksha Collector
encounters.desc: Oh, it's Cannot. You know him, the man who runs his own store while also working at 'Big Bob's Chain'. He's coming right for you... and you know what he wants...

choices.title: Pay him back in full, with interest
Pay him back
choices.desc: Return 20 Originium Ingots, lose Big Bob's Certificate

choices.title: Know what?
choices.desc: Wait, I have to pay it back?!

next.desc: Since you decided to feign ignorance, Cannot does not feel the need to be polite with you. He has plenty of experience handling this sort of thing.

choices.title: That it's time for a fight

encounters.title: Garden of Harvest
encounters.desc: During the Hundred Clan Rebellion, there was a hardworking peasant who tended his land all day long while his wife took their produce to sell in town, always fetching a good price. Upon seeing the quality of the land's yield, the local lord decided to seize it by force, driving the couple to their deaths and claiming it for himself. The next day, the crops broke through the soil, sending clods of dirt flying into the sky as the lord's entire family was swallowed up alive. Ever since, the crops took up hoes to plow and plant themselves, to this very day.

choices.title: There's treasure in that there field

next.desc: Relics from the Hundred Clan Rebellion will definitely fetch a good price.
The fruit this field bears is no doubt of highest quality.

In that age, holding onto your family's land was not easy. Farmers treated their fields like their children, and in return, those fields were filial to the farmers. But ever since that day, where could these wandering geists go but the Garden of Grotesqueries?

choices.title: Someone's gotta reap the harvest
choices.desc: Encounter a special and dangerous battle

encounters.title: Guest from the Sea
encounters.desc: Yi 'keeps' a strange Seaborn, one that fancies itself a 'strategist', analyzing games all day long. It invites you all to be its opponent.

choices.title: Let's give it a try
choices.desc: Can I pet you if we win?

next.desc: 'The state of play, I, decide.' The Seaborn makes it known.

choices.title: Won't be a problem
choices.desc: Toss Tongbao, event will proceed according to the result

choices.title: Yes...
variants: Encounter a special and dangerous battle

choices.title: What?
variants: Encounter a special and dangerous battle

encounters.title: A Game of Weiqi
encounters.desc: The whole of Yan split horizontally and vertically, divided by nineteen against nineteen lines, where truth and lie, black and white meet. The entirety of the land bound within a square. Before you arrived, Liu'er had been studying the board for quite a while via the elm butterfly. Unfortunately, she has only a passing understanding of weiqi, so she has not seen the secrets of this board. You look at it, noticing the game has only just started. This is obviously one of the tricks Wang left in the Garden, and the opponent he has chosen this time is you.

next.desc: Playing a game against the one who set up this mysterious game in the first place? Without even thinking, you flip the board. It spins through the air, each revolution revealing the strategy against you: one that lives amongst the mountains but is still obsessed with the battle atop the board shall never become his successor. Only by playing a strange move will there be space for the next step. The board clatters to the ground, revealing another grid of lines. A set of movable type, in its center a block of type with 'Ji' and 'Ye' carved onto it.

choices.title: Abide by the rules
choices.desc: Max Life Points are at least 15, gain a random Collectible and 3 Hope

choices.title: Keep going for gambits
choices.desc: Lose 3 Life Points, but gain a random Collectible

encounters.title: Hall of Candles
encounters.desc: This building near the entrance of the Garden is a place where Yanese tourists pay their respects and pray for good luck. They light joss sticks and candles to pray, leaving rising spirals of smoke when they leave. But when the Garden closes, this becomes the headquarters of the Sui Regulator's Garden Management. Under candles from all across Yan, Candleholders light their own candles to reaffirm their commitment to their duty and rekindle their spirits.

choices.title: Light a candle
choices.desc: Use conserved Recruitment Vouchers to light candles for Operators

choices.title: Borrow from the Sui Regulator
choices.desc: Once per run, light a candle for 1 recruited Operator

choices.title: Board to flame, characters to light
choices.desc: Have Unflinching Masterplan, encounter a special battle

choices.title: Break apart Sui's defenses
choices.desc: Obtain a special Collectible that makes battles more difficult

next.desc: The bestial Sui will awaken. Crystalized rage drips from the spike, idling by emotion's side, waiting for the moment to crush your heart.

encounters.title: A Meeting
encounters.desc: A line bisects the newlyweds' room. The left half has been scrubbed clean, and the furniture freshly painted. A recently tossed coin still spins on the table. The right half is covered in cobwebs and dust, and the furniture is rotten and brittle, as if long abandoned. Atop the bed, what seem to be lovers' tokens are arranged neatly, but their owners are nowhere to be seen.

choices.title: Take the token on the left
Take the token on the right
Take the hidden token
choices.desc: Have Four-Leaf Clover Fossil, obtain a Collectible

choices.title: Try solving the riddle
choices.desc: Toss Tongbao; if at least one Flower Coin is tossed, obtain all Collectibles above

choices.title: Do your best
choices.desc: Toss Tongbao; if at least one Risk Coin is tossed, obtain 1 relatively rare Collectible

next.desc: Two families, and two star-crossed lovers. The girl visited her love one night to elope, but the guards locked the two in a side room. The unfortunate souls laid down their tokens, intending to die in each other's arms, when suddenly the room warped, separating them in a realm that knew not night or day. Though they were in the same room, each only saw the four walls, and were only allowed to meet but one night a decade. By the time you broke their curse, it had been eighty years. They have no desire but to stay together forever.

encounters.title: Mount of Stone
encounters.desc: The land of Kou-wu is abundant with odd stones, formed by the erosion of wind and wave. They pile on one another to form mountain ranges, often used to decorate gardens and palaces; they may be craggy and steep, but they have their charms. The people of Kou-wu always say to 'ask the stones the way': they burn incense at the mountain's foot, then toss money at it. Hearing the tongbao clink within the rising mists brightens everyone's day. Kou-wu Hill in the Garden is no different, and is offered piles of tongbao and riches every holiday, an endless headache for the staff.

choices.title: Take a tongbao from within the mountain
choices.desc: Obtain 1 random Tongbao related to Vagary Tiles

next.desc: Most tongbao fall through gaps between the rocks to the foot of the mountain, which means very few actually stay within it. Perhaps they got wedged in a crack, or fell into a cavern. Seeing that the ones left here are the fortunate few, the luck they can impart must surely be extraordinary too.

choices.title: Take a tongbao from the mountain's foot
choices.desc: Obtain 1 random Tongbao related to combat

next.desc: The foot of the mountain is festooned with tongbao, along with some made of paper. There's even a... marble? You take a coin from the pile, and examine it carefully.

choices.title: Toss it back into the mountain

next.desc: The mount of stone boasts an entire vault's worth of coins. What's one more or one less to it? It stands there, entertaining guests in silence.

choices.title: Toss it back at the mountain's foot

next.desc: The mount of stone boasts an entire vault's worth of coins. What's one more or one less to it? It stands there, entertaining guests in silence.
The mount of stone boasts an entire vault's worth of coins. What's one more or one less to it? It stands there, entertaining guests in silence.

encounters.note: In the hidden area, this event appears as its legendary version

encounters.title: Communication
encounters.desc: No matter the era, sound will always be the most direct method of communication. While the new recruits fumble for the transceivers hanging at their waists, the experienced old master has already finished transmitting the information using a long, wavering whistle. When you hear it winding its way down the mountaintop, you know the mission is a success. Not long after, some equipment is sent over by burdenbeast for your use.

choices.title: Take a signal flag
choices.desc: Lose 6 Originium Ingots, but gain a Recruitment Voucher

next.desc: As you depart, the old master notices you are heading further into the Garden of Grotesqueries, and grabs your hand to ask you to pass a message to the Tianshi Bureau successors he is in contact with inside. Though you are unsure if they are human or geist, you still agree to do it.

encounters.note: In the hidden area, this event appears as its legendary version

encounters.title: Stamp Collection
encounters.desc: Everywhere across the Garden are seals tourists can use to add to their stamp collections, but this one is very unique. Every time you enter the Garden, it seems to change. There was once a slacker who went in and out to get stamps, who ended up discovering only nine combinations of three primary components and three secondary. Some Candleholders are specialized seal crafters. With their help, you can decide the contents and style of the seal. First, choose the primary pattern, shaped like characters—

choices.title: The one like a soldier and sword

next.desc: Next, choose the secondary pattern, also shaped like characters—
Once the adjustments are complete, stamp the table then turn it around. The seal will begin to shine, in accordance to the characters you chose.
After some tinkering, you leave the seal here, despite restoring it to its rightful state.
Once the adjustments are complete, stamp the table then turn it around. The seal will begin to shine, in accordance to the characters you chose.

choices.title: The one like flowers and plants

next.desc: Once the adjustments are complete, stamp the table then turn it around. The seal will begin to shine, in accordance to the characters you chose.

choices.title: The one like a bow and arrow

next.desc: Next, choose the secondary pattern, also shaped like characters—

choices.title: The one like mount and stream

next.desc: Next, choose the secondary pattern, also shaped like characters—

encounters.note: In the hidden area, this event appears as its legendary version

encounters.title: A Bevy of Fireworks
encounters.desc: The New Year has passed, but according to custom, the Candleholders of the Garden always treat it as just around the corner, setting off fireworks in open spaces around the Garden. These fireworks fill the sky, declaring Yan's might for all to see. The sound lets evil and calamity know its time is nigh. Apparently, if someone were to empty their pockets to fund one of these shows, they would receive an imperial tongbao in return.

choices.title: Take on the cost
choices.desc: Lose all Originium Ingots, but obtain and switch out a Tongbao

next.desc: Everyone pools their money and sets off some fireworks. The sky is filled with light while your ears are filled with the sounds of explosions. You cannot stop your mind from wandering. These flames, these cannon blasts... are all tightly interlinked with war.

encounters.note: In the hidden area, this event appears as its legendary version

encounters.title: Concentricity
encounters.desc: A set of concentric jade spheres, made with the finest craftsmanship, lies before you, each layer as thin as a cicada's wing. It seems there is something at the center of these multitudinous layers.

choices.title: Grab a tile, turn around, and jump out

next.desc: With a jade hairpin, you tinker with the spheres for an exceedingly long time before you espy the wonder within: at its very heart lies a bead of crystal, wholly transparent. Within is carved an entire village. You observe each and every minute detail, but once you lift your head, you realize you are now within it.

With Raidian taking the lead, you cautiously explore the village. After learning of the villagers' aggression, she tries to find a way to leave without causing conflict. However, while you are exploring, you are noticed by them.

You walk forward a few steps before running into some villagers, but the moment they see you, it's like they have encountered their nemesis. Their leader whistles, and soon, every living thing in the village is running your way.

choices.title: Prepare for battle
variants: Encounter a special and dangerous battle

choices.title: Ask Raidian to negotiate
choices.desc: Have Raidian in your squad, gain 3 Objective Shield and a random trinket

next.desc: The horizon sphere slowly begins to rotate. If you jump out right away, you won't come to any harm aside from a slight stumble outside... After a few more minutes of rotating, the crystal bead is enveloped under a multitude of layers once more, its secrets forever hidden from your prying eyes.

encounters.note: In the hidden area, this event appears as its legendary version

encounters.title: Prayer for Protection
encounters.desc: Every sacrifice a dispelment, every resolution a diminishment. Humanity fears calamity, so they are always thinking of ways to attain peace of mind. This is a good place for such attainment: water gathers in the center, flowing into the courtyard from four sides. There is also a great urn installed, where wealth and positivity gathers without fear of exposure or leakage. Within it there is a white lotus. While the mud at its bottom is turbid, its water is crystal-clear, like sweet dew. If you were to drink some, no doubt it would be of benefit to you.

choices.title: Drink some water, praying for good luck
...Grit your teeth and drink even more

next.desc: You have paid a price, and received a fair harvest for it. The fact that these things may be of good use to you in the future soothes you somewhat. 'Does this count as a prayer for protection?', you ask your companions with a hoarse throat. They can't really say for sure either.

choices.title: Pick up the thing that was washed clean
Pick up the thing covered in silt
I don't believe in feng shui
What's belief gonna do for me?

next.desc: Every sacrifice a dispelment, every resolution a diminishment. Humanity fears calamity, so they are always thinking of ways to attain peace of mind. This is a good place for such attainment: water gathers in the center, flowing into the courtyard from four sides. There is also a great urn installed, where wealth and positivity gathers without fear of exposure or leakage. Within it there is a white lotus. While the mud at its bottom is turbid, its water is crystal-clear, like sweet dew. If you were to drink some, no doubt it would be of benefit to you.

choices.title: This is tough and resilient, could be used for armor
This is perfect for getting out of the rain!

next.desc: You have paid a price, and received a fair harvest for it. The fact that these things may be of good use to you in the future soothes you somewhat. 'Does this count as a prayer for protection?', you ask your companions with a hoarse throat. They can't really say for sure either.

encounters.note: In the hidden area, this event appears as its legendary version

encounters.title: Memorial Hall Entrance
encounters.desc: Jianzi Shrine stands at the peak of one of the Garden's bounding mountains, an exceedingly normal building unlike its grotesque fellows. The origins of its name have been passed down orally from generation to generation of Candleholders. The pronunciation and meaning can be conveyed without error, but were you to try to write it down, you would end up with paper as blank as hall's plaques. This is where your duty ends, and where the master of the Garden awaits you.

choices.title: Offer the inkstick, then begin the rite
choices.desc:
Will a geist of ink also change?
(Have Carved Inkstick Remnant)

next.desc: Just as manglerbeasts cannot hunt fowlbeasts soaring through the sky, how can you harm the master of the Garden within its bounds? But this is what the ceremony means. Enter the Garden, take up the name of Sui, and do battle with the Sui proxy using both awe-inspiring might and knowing hand. Take the authority of mankind and plunge it into the Garden—straight into the bones of Sui.

encounters.title: The Finishing Stroke
encounters.desc: The Sui Regulator's ceremony should have ended at Jianzi Shrine, but you pass through the hall and set foot on Yi's heavenly stairway, descending into the bowels of the earth until you reach the Tomb of Sui. Around you is scattered rubble resembling displaced characters and discarded blocks of type. You take out the enigma left by Wang, and toss it into the mausoleum.

choices.title: I'm in!
choices.desc:
In unclarity shall heaven and earth be remade
Operators without lit candles cannot participate in this battle

choices.title: Who is that up ahead?
choices.desc: The weiqi player has been waiting a long time

encounters.title: Heaven-Blessed Hunt
encounters.desc: Ahead lies the end of the scroll's search, the place where Sui's remnant consciousness and the Tomb of Sui come together. Even Candleguests will lose their ability to discern reality from illusion. Only those seekers who have received the scroll's blessing will be able to go with you, to experience the final memory of the battle between humanity and Sui.

choices.title: Send everyone else out of the Tomb
choices.desc:
We shall return
Operators who didn't enter the scroll will temporarily leave, and only Operators in the scroll can participate in the final battle of Mingmie Peak

encounters.title: Strategizing
encounters.desc: All sorts of variables are in play in the awakening of Sui, and Wang must have an answer for all such possibilities. The slightest change in Its thoughts requires a rectification of said answer. As he is factoring in humanity as another one of his stones, it is only right that he let them in on his plans.

next.desc: Within the indelible shadows of the Tomb, Sui's subconscious creates an ever-shifting reality to tear through Wang's net.

choices.title: Wage war against the entire pack
choices.desc:
'Yi', 'Sui', and 'Wang' will appear in Dreadful Foe; 'Vessel of Shuo' and 'Arrogance Embodied' will appear at the same time
(Have Merciless and Ceaseless)

next.desc: As Sui's thoughts become more clear, a familiar yet unfamiliar face appears. Wang restrains all the factors still in flux, allowing you to focus on the dread foe before you.

choices.title: Study inheritance of form
choices.desc:
'Sui' will appear in Dreadful Foe
(Have Carved Inkstick Remnant)

choices.title: Sculpt the calendar
choices.desc:
'Statuegeists' will appear in Dreadful Foe
(Have Inkless Scroll)

choices.title: Alter the board
choices.desc:
'Wang' will appear in Dreadful Foe
(HaveCloud & Paint)

choices.title: Define a source
choices.desc:
'Vessel of Shuo' and 'Arrogance Embodied' will appear at the same time
(Have Merciless and Ceaseless)

encounters.title: One Player Short
encounters.desc: A red-horned white-bodied Feranmut spurts jets of flame out of boredom. Before her is a massive table, a set of her favorite mahjong tiles set up neatly. Upon noticing your arrival, two copper giants instantly take a seat at either side of the table. She straightens excitedly, inviting you to join. 'We just need one more player, c'mon! But first things first, we each gotta add a few coins to the pot to make things interesting. Hey, what're you scared of? Think I won't pay up if you win?'

choices.title: Another round?
choices.desc: Gain 3 Originium Ingots, 2 Hope, 2 Objective Shield, 1 random Collectible

choices.title: Help me with some smelting
choices.desc: Mother Cauldron is upgraded (up to 10 stacks)

choices.title: You win some, you lose some
choices.desc: Lose 1 Life Point and Max Life Point

next.desc: You'd rather not kill time with Nian here. Upon seeing you scurry away, she falls back into despair, flicking her tail in utter boredom as she waits for another player.

choices.title: Slip away!
choices.desc: Lose half your Objective Shield, leave

encounters.title: Sow Cause, Reap Consequence
encounters.desc: An indigo-maned Feranmut lies coiled around a vast paddy field. A light rain falls from the heavens, intermingled with tiny wishes. They fall upon the earth, take root and sprout into all sorts of things. Upon seeing you, she shifts her tail, granting you an entrance.

next.desc: There is still space in the paddy, and you can still plant some hope, but it seems overly-flippant wishes will not bear fruit here.

choices.title: Add to the bamboo
choices.desc: Delicate Bamboo is upgraded (up to 10 stacks)

next.desc: As you leave the field, Shu closes the entrance behind you. Causality is a loop. The hopeful causes you planted have grown into all sorts of consequences. But have you ever wondered whose causes sown allowed you to 'come across' this harvest?

choices.title: Plant a wish like Sui's
choices.desc: Have Shen-Chu Wheel, lose 2 Hope and Max Hope, can obtain greater rewards and cost no longer increases

choices.title: Thanks!
choices.desc: Gain 5 Originium Ingots, 2 Objective Shield, 1 random Collectible, 2 Coupons

encounters.title: Resonant Words
encounters.desc: Amidst the mist, a Feranmut flits and flickers, in a state somewhere between swimming through the sky, reclining against a hill, and lying prone on the ground. A giant wine cup is wedged between some mountains, drink spilling from it like a waterfall. She sees you, and turns the cup your way. After three rounds, she feels things have become a bit dull, so suggests tossing some coins to amuse yourselves.

choices.title: A pair of weapons, says I
A pot of wine, says I
'As orderly as balance'
variants: Toss Tongbao; if at least one Balance Coin is tossed, obtain 30 Originium Ingots
Toss Tongbao; if at least one Balance Coin is tossed, obtain 65 Originium Ingots
Toss Tongbao; if at least one Balance Coin is tossed, obtain 15 Originium Ingots

choices.title: 'As pointed as risk'
choices.desc: Toss Tongbao; if at least two Risk Coins are tossed, can obtain a reward of your choosing

choices.title: 'As clustered as flowers'
variants: Toss Tongbao; if at least two Flower Coins are tossed, obtain 3 random Collectibles
Toss Tongbao; if at least two Flower Coins are tossed, obtain 6 random Collectibles
Toss Tongbao; if at least two Flower Coins are tossed, obtain 2 random Collectibles

next.desc: Seeing you slowly walk away into the distance, Ling drains her cup dry, then vanishes into the mists.

choices.title: Hold on!
variants: Have Shen-Chu Wheel; retoss Tongbao; if at least 2 Balance Coins are tossed, obtain 2 random Collectibles
Have Shen-Chu Wheel; retoss Tongbao; if at least 2 Balance Coins are tossed, obtain 3 random Collectibles
Have Shen-Chu Wheel; retoss Tongbao; if at least 2 Balance Coins are tossed, obtain 6 random Collectibles

encounters.title: Meeting a Friend
encounters.desc: The coin falls to the floor and you ready yourself to do it once more—

choices.title: Dip coin in wax
choices.desc: Lose 3 Originium Ingots; give Tongbao the Condition: Light (+1 Candle when added to Coffer)

choices.title: Once more, add material!
variants: Lose 10 Originium Ingots; give Tongbao the Condition: Alloy (Treated as Flower, Risk, and Balance Coin at the same time)
Lose 6 Originium Ingots; give Tongbao the Condition: Alloy (Treated as Flower, Risk, and Balance Coin at the same time)

choices.title: Once more, recast!
variants: Lose 10 Originium Ingots; give Tongbao the Condition: Protean (Becomes a random Tongbao when it returns to the Coffer after toss)
Lose 6 Originium Ingots; give Tongbao the Condition: Protean (Becomes a random Tongbao when it returns to the Coffer after toss)

choices.title: Recast coin
choices.desc: Lose 3 Originium Ingots; give Tongbao the Condition: Protean (Becomes random Tongbao when returning to Coffer after toss)

choices.title: Add material
choices.desc: Lose 3 Originium Ingots; give Tongbao the Condition: Alloy (Treated as Flower, Risk, and Balance Coin at the same time)

next.desc: Your interest wanes, and you put the Tongbao back into your coffer.

choices.title: Once more, dip coin in wax!
variants: Lose 6 Originium Ingots; give Tongbao the Condition: Light (+1 Candle when added to Coffer)
Lose 10 Originium Ingots; give Tongbao the Condition: Light (+1 Candle when added to Coffer)

next.desc: Your interest wanes, and you put the Tongbao back into your coffer.

encounters.title: Uninvited Guest
encounters.desc: Your sudden arrival startles a Feranmut putting ink onto the canvas of the land. This is her painting, and she never invited you in! ...Perhaps you should apologize to her.

next.desc: She does not immediately accept your gift, but she does not decline it either. After a long hesitation, the mountains fade away, and the mists converge into the form of a human. Dusk says this was something she left behind for the doddering elders of Yan's seal, but since it ended up in your hands, she'll have to see this job through after all. 'So, what do you want?' She tries to hide her impatience as best as she can.

choices.title: I'd like some power
choices.desc: Every time you toss Tongbao, toss 1 additional Tongbao

choices.title: I'd like free passage through the Garden

next.desc: She does not immediately accept your gift, but she does not decline it either. After a long hesitation, the mountains fade away, and the mists converge into the form of a human. Dusk says this was something she left behind for the doddering elders of Yan's seal, but since it ended up in your hands, she'll have to see this job through after all. 'So, what do you want?' She tries to hide her impatience as best as she can.

choices.title: Help yourself
choices.desc: Have Yin-Shih Flask, gain 3 Max Life Points

encounters.title: Amber
encounters.desc: A giant chunk of amber juts out of the shoreline of the eastern sea. Men cannot approach it, storms cannot shift it. It follows a cycle of four hundred years in a day: a hundred years of spewing smoke, a hundred years of tears, a hundred years of twisted scars, then a hundred years encased in stone, before it loops back around again.

choices.title: Return the uncracked egg to the amber

next.desc: In great amber's bones of stone, a universe of its own.
A strange piece of curious rock, thousands of years without shift or shock.

choices.title: Offer treasure as tribute
choices.desc: Have Yin-Shih Flask; toss Tongbao; if 2 Flower Coins are tossed, obtain Three-Legged Goldfowl

encounters.title: Butterfly of Elm
encounters.desc: A butterfly made of elmwood stops not too far from you, its front feet clinging tightly to an inkstick. You assume it to be one of the Garden's geists, but it opens its mouth, and you hear Liu'er's voice. She has finished researching Shuo's military treatise. According to her, this inkstick can be used 'to remember the forgotten and reveal vestiges of the past'. But only once she has flown to your side does she realize she forgot to finish carving the inkstick. Though she can use the butterfly to do so, the expenses... Even one as wealthy as she would balk at the price.

choices.title: Pay
choices.desc: Lose 30 Originium Ingots, but gain Collectible

choices.title: Send her back first
choices.desc:
Cover your ears and ignore Liu'er's tantrum
(Has a chance to obtain Ink of the Hidden Butterfly)

choices.title: Try it yourself
variants: Lose all Originium Ingots, but gain Collectible
Lose at most 5 Originium Ingots, but gain a Collectible

choices.title: Toss a Tongbao to decide
choices.desc: Have Yin-Shih Flask; toss Tongbao; if 1 Flower Coin is tossed, obtain Ink of the Hidden Butterfly for a lower cost

encounters.title: Advice
encounters.desc: A Feranmut flies towards you, with scales of teal and a mane of pink. Where he passes, clouds gather and rains concentrate, interweaving into a canopy. Upon the ground, plants grow with wild abandon, as if carved beams stretching out to touch the clouds. All things, whether natural or artificial, take on new forms when by his side. He circles about for a while before landing in front of you. When he speaks, he speaks with the words of man, asking if you require his aid. You hear not the voice of a stranger, but that of the master of the Garden of Grotesqueries.

next.desc: A cloud that turned into a fowlbeast alights atop his horn for a moment, swiftly metamorphosing once more into a pondfin before slipping away into the waters crowding the sky. He can use external tools to help you stay here, and also teach you ways to slow the banishment of your consciousness back to the surface. Of course, you have to give something.

choices.title: Here, for you
variants: Lose all your Originium Ingots, but gain 3 Candles
Lose half your Originium Ingots, but gain 2 Candles
Lose half your Hope, but gain 2 Candles
Lose half your Hope, but gain 3 Candles

choices.title: Just do me a favor?
variants: Have Yin-Shih Flask, lose one-tenth of your Originium Ingots, gain 2 Candles
Have Yin-Shih Flask, lose 1 Hope, gain 2 Candles
Have Yin-Shih Flask, lose 1 Hope, gain 3 Candles
Have Yin-Shih Flask, lose one-fifth of your Originium Ingots, gain 3 Candles

next.desc: Although he wishes to render you assistance, he is still a Sui proxy. You cannot risk beseeching him for aid, and you absolutely cannot fulfill his unreasonable requests.

choices.title: Cultivate inner strength
choices.desc: Chance to gain 3 Candles, but price may also increase

next.desc: Although he wishes to render you assistance, he is still a Sui proxy. You cannot risk beseeching him for aid, and you absolutely cannot fulfill his unreasonable requests.

encounters.title: An 'Accumulation' of Life
encounters.desc: Mo Yi retains her human form here, the bestial Sui seeming to have no effect on her. She knows you cannot enter these doors, so she receives you at the schoolhouse's edge. She likes it here, for no matter if you are man, beast, or geist, you will appear as your truest self. And the first step in communication is frank honesty. 'I need some tongbao to feed the geists. Perhaps you are willing to make a donation?'

choices.title: I'll trust you just this once
choices.desc: Toss Tongbao, event will proceed according to the result

next.desc: You never really trusted this member of the Shanhaizhong, so you take off into the sky, leaving her on the ground below.

'When it comes to imitation, I feel as though geists are much more eager to excel in that field than we are. I am unsure if they will ever understand the difference between copying and learning.' Mo Yi picks up the copper coins on the ground, then merges them into one before returning it to you.

encounters.title: Old Slyfeather
encounters.desc: You have met with Feranmuts, but you have never seen such a huge fowlbeast before. Flames cling to its feathers, sonic booms unable to keep up with its afterimage. It circles around you a few times until your hair has been curled from the heat, before dexterously landing on an ancient tree in front of you, watching you like you were a worm. 'Aren't the things in this garden a right pain in the ass, youngster?' It sizes you up, its eyes locking onto your purse. 'I've got plenty of treasures for taming geists, so giving you one won't be an issue. You interested?'

choices.title: I sure am!
choices.desc: Lose three-quarters of your Originium Ingots, but gain Collectible

choices.title: I am
choices.desc: Have crossed at least 10 nodes in Sui's Remnant Consciousness

next.desc: As they say, 'beware the suddenly kind', even if they're an old friend. As she tosses over the treasure, you subconsciously guard your purse, though she still manages to snag a handful of coins, flying away behind you. 'Now that's a smart youngster!' She seems happy, chirping away. 'That's how the kids at the Sui Regulator should be! I'm gonna go buy myself something to eat first. Once you're done with the ceremony, remember to drop by the Tianshi Bureaus to give that back to me.' Before the sound even reaches your ears, she is gone.

choices.desc: Lose a quarter of your Originium Ingots, but gain Collectible

next.desc: As they say, 'beware the suddenly kind', even if they're an old friend. As she tosses over the treasure, you subconsciously guard your purse, though she still manages to snag a handful of coins, flying away behind you. 'Now that's a smart youngster!' She seems happy, chirping away. 'That's how the kids at the Sui Regulator should be! I'm gonna go buy myself something to eat first. Once you're done with the ceremony, remember to drop by the Tianshi Bureaus to give that back to me.' Before the sound even reaches your ears, she is gone.

encounters.title: Hundred Clan Rebellion
encounters.desc: The earth is torn asunder by battle, forces and factions split from one another as tyrants spring up by the second. You stand high up in the clouds, looking down upon the earth. You are well-acquainted with this period of history, having read the textbooks countless times before, but it is only once you have seen it in such a real way that you know of the joys and sorrows it contained.

choices.title: Change history
choices.desc: Lose 2 Originium Ingots, but recruit an Operator

next.desc: A gout of flame burns from the ships linked with iron chains to the eight hundred li army camp, burning down the cities and the capital, searing away scrolls and hallways. The Hundred Clan Rebellion was born in the fires of Yan, and in the fires of Yan it ended. This has long since been its conclusion. What is unclear is if the brilliant strategies of the nobility will be enough to cover up the weeping of the common people as they suffer.

choices.title: Use a little effort
choices.desc: Recruit one Operator of a random class

choices.title: Give your all
choices.desc: Have crossed at least 10 nodes in Sui's Remnant Consciousness, recruit an Operator from any Class

choices.title: Work it masterfully
choices.desc: Have Yin-Shih Flask, recruit an Operator from any class, this recruitment can light a candle for the Operator (cannot be conserved)

encounters.title: Forms Lost Meaning
encounters.desc: Nobody cares that these tangled characters were dumped here.

choices.title: Use money to solve this puzzle of letters
choices.desc: When you have 50 or more Originium Ingots, pass through this node and gain greater rewards

next.desc: The tangled chaos becomes orderly matter. Although you do not recognize these characters, you can guess that their meaning should be—

choices.title: Beyond my ability
choices.desc: Leave; does not pass this node but does not consume Candles

choices.title: Use imagination to grant shape and meaning
choices.desc: When you have 6 or more Hope, pass through this node

next.desc: The tangled chaos becomes orderly matter. Although you do not recognize these characters, you can guess that their meaning should be—

choices.title: Use joy to learn their definitions
choices.desc: When you have 3 or more Coupons, pass through this node

next.desc: The tangled chaos becomes orderly matter. Although you do not recognize these characters, you can guess that their meaning should be—

encounters.title: For Tomorrow
encounters.desc: This army camp in Sui's memories is in perfect order. People hone their skills and polish their swords, preparing to face the last two Feranmuts within Yan aside from Sui.

choices.title: Receive an artifact
choices.desc: Obtain 1 random Collectible, pass through this node

choices.title: Leave
choices.desc: Leave; does not pass this node but does not consume Candles

choices.title: Begin reconnaissance
choices.desc:
Have Unsealed Case, choose an Operator to enter the scroll
Operators who enter the scroll will temporarily leave, and only Operators in the scroll can participate in the final battle of Mingmie Peak

encounters.title: Finishing Touch
encounters.desc: The brush and paper are ready. Dark ink marks the inkstone. You may be able to redefine reality a little with these.

choices.title: Ask Yu for a meal
choices.desc: Lose 10 Originium Ingots, but recover 6 Life Points

choices.title: Experience it again
choices.desc: Lose 8 Originium Ingots, but receive 1 random Collectible

choices.title: Make another drawing
choices.desc: Lose 10 Originium Ingots, but gain 5 Objective Shield

choices.title: Try one more time
choices.desc: Lose 3 Hope, but receive 1 random Collectible

choices.title: Practice some more
choices.desc: Lose 5 Life Points, but gain 6 Objective Shield

choices.title: Ask Nian to forge some scales
choices.desc: Lose 5 Life Points, but gain 15 Originium Ingots

choices.title: Use myriad laws to set tone
choices.desc: Have Wei-Chien Rule, gain 12 Originium Ingots (once only)

choices.title: Use countless herbs to cure sores
variants: Have Wei-Chien Rule, gain 6 Max Life Points (once only)
Have Wei-Chien Rule, lose 1 Candle, gain 6 Max Life Points (once only)

choices.title: Use skillful craft to build form
variants: Have Wei-Chien Rule, gain 10 Objective Shield (once only)
Have Wei-Chien Rule, lose 1 Candle, gain 10 Objective Shield (once only)

choices.title: Use silken weave to braid mane
variants: Have Wei-Chien Rule, gain 6 Hope (once only)
Have Wei-Chien Rule, lose 1 Candle, gain 6 Hope (once only)

choices.title: Ask Ling for enlightenment
choices.desc: Lose 8 Originium Ingots, but receive 1 random Collectible

choices.title: Use gridded board to consider plans
choices.desc: Have Wei-Chien Rule, gain 2 relatively rare Collectibles (once only)

choices.title: Ask Dusk to touch up your body
choices.desc: Lose 10 Originium Ingots, but gain 5 Objective Shield

choices.title: Break apart Sui's defenses
choices.desc: Have 'Little Moji'; obtain a special Collectible that can make Dreadful Foe nodes more difficult

next.desc: With Little Moji's help, you peel back the surface of Sui to reveal the spikes of rancor hiding beneath Its skin. They pace about by you, ready to tear apart your flesh at any moment.

choices.title: Use ink to birth a tool
choices.desc: The story will head towards a different ending

next.desc: Yi fetches the long, inked scroll. Each of your trips through the Garden has left behind precious marks, and the assembly of such remnants means that the Garden, even the Tomb, holds no more secrets for you, and also... that you can rouse the incomplete instrument. But whether or not you wish to take on this burden for the Sui proxies and use humanity's determination to complete the device—

choices.title: Bring ink to paper
choices.desc: Lose 5 Max Life Points; obtain Memory Scope

choices.title: This is as far as I can go...
variants: Lose all Originium Ingots; change 1 Hour of Sui
Lose 2 Candles; change 1 Hour of Sui

choices.title: Alter the Hour of Sui
variants: Use Originium Ingots; change the Hour of Sui
Lose 2 Candles; change the Hour of Sui

choices.title: Ask Shu to derive cause and effect
choices.desc: Lose 3 Hope and Max Hope, but receive 1 random Collectible

next.desc: You copy Its form, you copy Its spirit, but to the Sui proxies, it is as if you tried to draw a Feline and ended up with a Perro. It's completely wrong. Maybe you can ask them to help you make some improvements.

choices.title: Ask Chongyue to press the advantage
choices.desc: Lose 5 Life Points, but gain 6 Objective Shield

choices.title: Have another go
choices.desc: Lose 10 Originium Ingots, but recover 6 Life Points

encounters.title: Fork in the Road
encounters.desc: This road up the mountain leads straight to a tourist spot, one fenced off to prevent tourists from going any further. But you see several paths heading beyond the fence. One is a bare and level dirt path, as if flattened by countless steps; one is a faint beast trail, covered by vegetation; one seems to have been marked by crushing wheels, the ruts still clear in the ground.

next.desc: After following the road for a while, you look behind you to see several paths reconverging where you stand... You once heard of a crafter who could see through the paths of life and death and pave them into roads. This road may have a myriad forks, but there is only one start, and one end. Traversing a single path is as traversing ten thousand of them.

choices.title: Go along the marked path
choices.desc: Recruit one Operator of a random class

encounters.title: 'Big Bob's Chain'
encounters.desc: A Westerner has come to open up a shop, even writing his name out in Yanese. His only salesperson is a strange man covered in writhing tentacles, and their most popular service is moneylending... You can't get any more ridiculous than this.

choices.title: Borrow
choices.desc: Gain 20 Originium Ingots and Big Bob's Certificate

next.desc: From what you've heard, this shopkeeper 'whose name is Bob and whose surname is Big' has made many contributions to the business world in the West, and is now in the process of giving his store a local Yanese flavor. You know businesses in the West have a tradition of putting their owner's full name in their brand... but... 'Big Bob's Chain'... You're not sure which particular smarty-pants racked their brains to think up such a 'fine' name for him...

choices.title: Borrow even more
choices.desc: Only when at 1 Life Point: Gain 40 Originium Ingots and Big Bob's Certificate

encounters.title: Suppressing the Earth
encounters.desc: One can see wooden pillars shaped like nails or rules all across the Garden, drained of all color. Their influence can be seen in their monochrome surroundings. One need only stand within this zone to lose your grip on your senses, and for your consciousness to transcend your body. If you take it one step further—

choices.title: Sit, and let your spirit soar
choices.desc: Gain 3 base Candles, then decide if you wish to enter Sui's Remnant Consciousness

choices.title: Open your eyes—
choices.desc: Enter Sui's Remnant Consciousness; can obtain additional Candles from other sources

choices.title: Return to your body
choices.desc: Leave; base Candles can be kept for the next time you enter Sui's Remnant Consciousness

next.desc: Through the combined power of the Sui proxies, you see the imagined awakening of a god within the ever-spinning instrument.

encounters.title: Where Then Meets Now
encounters.desc: In the depths of the Tomb of Sui, the boundary between Sui's remnant consciousness and reality is thin. Here, it is as if you need only desire to pierce the veil and submerge yourself into Sui's memories, and it shall be done. With your experiences in the remnant consciousness, this is hardly a challenge.

choices.title: Merge with the remnant consciousness
choices.desc: Gain 7 base Candles, then enter a special Sui's Remnant Consciousness

choices.title: Burn incense and candles
choices.desc: Use 1 conserved Recruitment Voucher to light a candle for 1 Operator, then gain 6 base Candles and decide if you wish to enter Sui's Remnant Consciousness

choices.title: Open your eyes—
choices.desc: Enter a special Sui's Remnant Consciousness; can obtain additional Candles from other sources

choices.title: Think over your actions
choices.desc: Gain 6 base Candles, then enter a special Sui's Remnant Consciousness

next.desc: Through the combined power of the Sui proxies, you see the imagined awakening of a god within the ever-spinning instrument.

encounters.title: All Are Welcome
encounters.desc: You see a stall off in the distance, surrounded by a massive and varied crowd of statues made of clay, stone, porcelain, and iron. The young Liberi manning the stall is selling them small silk bags. She spots you, then starts hawking her wares to you as you pass by: 'It's rare to see bigshots from the Sui Regulator here! How about a bag? You can find stuff that's pretty rare outside the Garden in them!'

choices.title: Pick a small one
choices.desc: Lose 4 Originium Ingots, gain 1 random trinket

next.desc: You wave your hand and the young Liberi stops bothering you, returning to her business with the statues.

choices.title: Pick a big one
choices.desc: Lose 15 Originium Ingots, gain 3 random trinkets

encounters.title: Seclusion
encounters.desc: Wild beasts—or rather, things shaped like beasts—are frolicking about the periphery of the Garden. Stone fowl are chased by literal cloudbeasts into the sky, while wooden burdenbeasts chew on fodder as they gaze at the copper fins in the pond. These creatures do not fear humans, some even greeting acquaintances with a nuzzle and a cry for food. Most of your team has been charmed by these friendly creatures. Maybe you can relax a bit too.

choices.title: Call the beasts over
choices.desc: Have Raidian in your squad, gain 2 Coupons and 2 Max Life Points

encounters.title: Taotie Veranda
encounters.desc: There was once a strange beast in the southwest that feared the strong but harried the weak. Its greed was insatiable, until it was brought to heel by a hero who forced it to devour its own body, killing it amidst the mountains. Over time, this avatar of greed has taken on a new form, becoming an auspice of wealth carved everywhere. The most famous of these carvings is located in this long, open corridor in the Garden. Countless visitors pass through here, not only to pray for infinite wealth, but for the chance to chance upon priceless coins.

next.desc: Strange matters most certainly involve geists. According to the Sui Regulator's recommendation, best not to come into contact with them.

choices.title: Pass through
choices.desc: Have at least 1 Flower Coin, can examine one additional Tongbao

next.desc: When there are no visitors around, the corridor seems more generous than usual. A few steps in and you can already see new coins scattered about. It appears it really wants you to take a coin with you.

encounters.title: Rites of Flame
encounters.desc: The pavilion before you is full of dust, but marks on the floor tiles and candle wax atop the boards are signs of past use. When the Garden first came to be, the Sui Regulator and the Tianshi Bureaus had joint supervision. When the Candleholders and Tianshis completed the rite, they would often come here to rest. And so it is here that they first ascended and touched upon the borders of Sui's consciousness, which also marked a great leap in Yan's Feranmutology research.

choices.title: Hold a candle to the sky
choices.desc: The next time you enter Sui's Remnant Consciousness, gain 1 additional Candle

next.desc: After a short rest, everyone gets back on the road.

choices.title: Clear the air with thunder
choices.desc: Lose 5 Life Points; the next time you enter Sui's Remnant Consciousness, gain 3 additional Candles

encounters.title: Lone Angler
encounters.desc: The river's surface is calm, and an old man sits at the shore, angling. His bamboo basket is empty, and there is no bait upon his hook, but it seems that is no obstacle to always having a catch on the line. Seeing you approach, he offers you a seat. 'This angling of mine attracts no fins. When the hook is cast, it is myself that I catch.' Seeing the doubt on your face, he offers you the rod. 'If you do not believe, why not try it yourself? The first cast will need bait. Do you have anything suitable?'

next.desc: You have important matters to attend to, and should not dilly-dally here. You bid farewell to the old man and leave.

choices.title: Look at Raidian
choices.desc: Have Raidian in your squad, gain 2 base Candles

choices.title: Heaven and earth spin round and round...
choices.desc: Enter Sui's Remnant Consciousness; can obtain additional Candles from other sources

encounters.title: Times Change
encounters.desc: The Hours of Sui appear one after the other in the Garden of Grotesqueries, where these intangible concepts eventually condense into reality under their creator's influence. Due to forming at different moments in time, every crystal has a unique shape. The Chamber of Geists has already developed uses for several of these crystals, which may be of aid to you during the rite.

choices.title: I wish for the Hour of Hai
choices.desc: Obtain Hai-Shih Stove (has wondrous effects in Retrieve nodes; after completing all Retrieve nodes, gain 2 Candles)

next.desc: The officials of the Chamber of Geists quickly find the crystal you seek. You need only use the tongbao of the Garden to cleanse it, and you shall obtain the crystallized Hour of Sui.

choices.title: Use clustered flowers to wipe it

Toss Tongbao; if 1 Flower Coin is tossed, obtain Wei-Chien Rule

Toss Tongbao; if 2 Balance Coins are tossed, obtain Wei-Chien Rule
Toss Tongbao; if 2 Balance Coins are tossed, obtain Hai-Shih Stove
