Toss Tongbao; if 1 Risk Coin is tossed, obtain Wei-Chien Rule
Toss Tongbao; if 1 Risk Coin is tossed, obtain Hai-Shih Stove

choices.title: Accept the crystal
choices.desc: Can it summon its rightful owner?

choices.title: Forget it
choices.desc: Better not use geists too often

choices.title: The Hour of Yin sounds good
choices.desc: Obtain Yin-Shih Flask (Hope +2; the next entry into Sui's Remnant Consciousness will have some Legend and Decision nodes revealed; has wondrous effects in some Legend nodes)

next.desc: The officials of the Chamber of Geists quickly find the crystal you seek. You need only use the tongbao of the Garden to cleanse it, and you shall obtain the crystallized Hour of Sui.

choices.title: The Hour of Wei is most suitable
choices.desc: Obtain Wei-Chien Rule (Originium Ingots +6, has wondrous effects in Tavern nodes)

next.desc: The officials of the Chamber of Geists quickly find the crystal you seek. You need only use the tongbao of the Garden to cleanse it, and you shall obtain the crystallized Hour of Sui.

encounters.title: In the Rest Pavilion
encounters.desc: Traversing the Garden to see its sights inevitably leads to tired legs. This pavilion has been set up for tourists to rest and recuperate. With the breeze flitting past your face and majestic sights ahead, no matter how rugged the road ahead may be, at least you will be able to catch your breath here without worry.

choices.title: Open your eyes—
choices.desc: Enter Sui's Remnant Consciousness; can obtain additional Candles from other sources

choices.title: Eat your fill
choices.desc: When under the effect of Good Harvest, gain 3 Max Life Points and recover 5 Life Points

choices.title: Light a candle
choices.desc: Use 1 conserved Recruitment Voucher to light a candle for an Operator

choices.title: Get into formation
choices.desc: Use 1 conserved Recruitment Voucher to light a candle for one Operator, then gain 2 base Candles and enter Sui's Remnant Consciousness

choices.title: Empty your mind—
choices.desc: Gain 2 base Candles, then enter Sui's Remnant Consciousness

encounters.title: Bout by the Dusk River
encounters.desc: This arena comes from the ancient sparring grounds at the river island in the middle of Dusk City. The river split the residents into north and south, and they were always ready with a snide comment for the people of the other side. And so, the annual 'Dusk River Bout' single-elimination tournament became the best way to resolve their disputes. The island is long gone from the whims of geology, but the tradition lives on to this day.

next.desc: You are of the north side, while I am of the south. Step into the arena, bow, and begin the fight. Only then shall we talk.

choices.title: Light the candles! To the arena!
choices.desc: Through battle, the candle is watched!

next.desc: Most bouts end with first blood, but if the candles are lit, it means grudges run deep, and the fight will continue until one party lies dead.

choices.title: Have at you!
choices.desc: Encounter a special battle; after victory, you may turn the participating Operators to Candleguests

encounters.title: Heroes of Nanwu
encounters.desc: This arena comes from the martial arts ring in the middle of Nanwu City's bazaar. Nanwu has been a trade hub since ancient times, and has nurtured many families of martial artists and escorts. In order to claim first place at the annual Gathering of Heroes, every martial arts school and escort agency sent their most skilled disciples to compete. Nowadays, even though the competition has taken on more pageantry, the Gathering of Heroes is still the embodiment of the martial spirit of the Nanwu people.

next.desc: Since it is the Gathering of Heroes, there are not only singles here. Find a good partner, and step into the arena.

choices.title: Light the candles! To the arena!
choices.desc: Through battle, the candle is watched!

next.desc: Before ascending to the arena, candles are lit before a grand audience of your peers. It is clear how solemn this competition will be. The victor will be acclaimed by the entire city; the loser will slink off in the darkness.

choices.title: Have at you!
choices.desc: Encounter a special battle; after victory, you may turn the participating Operators to Candleguests

encounters.title: Lamp-Holders and Candle-Wielders
encounters.desc: All human employees of the Garden are also part of the Sui Regulator, which is no secret within the Regulator itself. When the Garden is open, they act as tour guides, gardeners, and security. When it closes, they supervise spirits, record changes, and exorcise geists as lamp-holders and candle-wielders. During the Placation, they make for excellent guides and sentinels, and every Candleholder has benefited from their aid.

choices.title: Apply for a candle-wielder
choices.desc: Choose an Operator, light a candle on their return (Consumes 1 Life Point after selecting Operator)

choices.title: Apply for a case-carrier
choices.desc:
Have Unsealed Case, choose an Operator to enter the scroll
Operators who enter the scroll will temporarily leave, and only Operators in the scroll can participate in the final battle of Mingmie Peak

choices.title: Touch the scroll
choices.desc:
Have Unsealed Case, choose an Operator to enter the scroll
Operators who enter the scroll will temporarily leave, and only Operators in the scroll can participate in the final battle of Mingmie Peak

encounters.title: Joined at the hip
encounters.desc: The scene before you begins to blur. From the haze, you think you are able to make out...

choices.title: Hand over your coffer
choices.desc: Toss Tongbao, event will proceed according to the result

choices.title: Is that Liu'er?
choices.desc: Replenish Conserved Recruitment Vouchers up to conservation limit

choices.title: Is that... Liu'er?!
choices.desc: Obtain a 6-Star Random Promotion Temporary Rec. Voucher

choices.title: That might be Liu'er.
choices.desc: Obtain a random Recruitment Voucher and 4 Originium Ingots

choices.title: Grasp luck to make a deal

next.desc: Yi weighs the tenacious luck in his hand, believing that rather than acting restrained, he would much rather put it all on the line like you have.

choices.title: Eat your fill
choices.desc: When under the effect of Good Harvest, gain 3 Max Life Points and recover 5 Life Points

choices.title: Lamp-Holders and Candle-Wielders
variants: Choose an Operator, light a candle on their return (Consumes 1 Life Point after selecting Operator)

choices.title: A box of treasures
variants: Gain a random amount of Originium Ingots

choices.title: Tongbao
variants: Lose 16 Originium Ingots; toss Tongbao, event will proceed according to the result
Lose all Tongbao, then obtain the same amount of random Tongbao
Lose all Originium Ingots and all Tongbao, then obtain the same amount of random Flower Coins
Lose 5 Life Points and all Tongbao, then obtain the same amount of random Risk Coins
Toss Tongbao, event will proceed according to the result

choices.title: A signal flag
choices.desc: Use conserved Recruitment Vouchers to light candles for Operators

choices.title: Alright!
choices.desc: Lose all Collectibles, then obtain the same amount of random Collectibles

choices.title: Do such good things really exist?
variants: Obtain 3 Coupons, 3 Hope, and 3 random Collectibles

choices.title: Liu'er
choices.desc: Recruit an Operator or add to your Conserved Recruitment Vouchers

next.desc: When you step into Liu'er's hidden workshop, she is pondering the mysteries of the Tongbao. She appears to have been expecting you, inviting you to look at the results of her research. She does not ask for payment this time, but glances at your coin coffer from time to time.

choices.title: Liang
choices.desc: If at least 3 Risk Coins are tossed, can exchange all Collectibles at once

next.desc: Traversing the Garden to see its sights inevitably leads to tired legs. This pavilion has been set up for tourists to rest and recuperate. With the breeze flitting past your face and majestic sights ahead, no matter how rugged the road ahead may be, at least you will be able to catch your breath here without worry.

encounters.title: A Chance to Live
encounters.desc: A fire burns in an empty clearing, an unquenchable, unending source of light and heat. You approach it, even touch it, but you are not burned. It may not be part of you, but its energies feel very familiar.

choices.title: Sit on the ground
choices.desc: Recover 5 Life Points, gain 1 Max Life Point

next.desc: It's just a fire. Not worth sticking around for.

choices.title: Pace about
choices.desc: Having crossed at least 5 nodes in Sui's Remnant Consciousness, gain 3 Max Life Points and recover all Life Points

choices.title: Touch the flame
choices.desc: Have Yin-Shih Flask, gain 4 Max Life Points and recover all Life Points

encounters.title: Circled Square
encounters.desc: Traces of humanity left over the eons are scattered across the land like tongbao. Sometimes they thrive, sometimes they decline. You look at the coins in your pouch. If you just happened to toss them, how would time change them?

choices.title: Toss the coin again
variants:
Lose 1 Life Point, exchange 1 Tongbao
(Available for Blooming Flowers Squad)

choices.title: Place your coins
choices.desc: Use Originium Ingots to add Conditions to your Tongbao

next.desc: The eras of humanity flowing by have been hidden in these many tongbao. They fall into the mortal realm, jingling and jangling, and when the dust settles, they all sport a trace of divinity. You see them clearly, but you do not know what this scene looks like in the eyes of Sui.

encounters.title: Money-Minded Liu
encounters.desc: When you step into Liu'er's hidden workshop, she is pondering the mysteries of the Tongbao. She appears to have been expecting you, inviting you to look at the results of her research. She does not ask for payment this time, but glances at your coin coffer from time to time.

choices.title: Look at her research
choices.desc: Recruitment Voucher conservation limit +1; Recruit an Operator

choices.title: Hand over your coffer
choices.desc: Toss Tongbao, event will proceed according to the result

choices.title: Is that Liu'er?
choices.desc: Replenish Conserved Recruitment Vouchers up to conservation limit

choices.title: Is that... Liu'er?!
choices.desc: Lose all Conserved Recruitment Vouchers, then obtain the same amount of random Conserved Recruitment Vouchers

choices.title: That might be Liu'er.
choices.desc: Obtain a random Recruitment Voucher and 4 Originium Ingots

encounters.title: Proxy Squad Jump
encounters.desc: With the aid of the Sui proxies, all issues in the Garden of Grotesqueries can be resolved.

choices.title: The proxies' full support lies before you

encounters.title: View
encounters.desc: Your body is as Sui's, your eyes looking towards the earth. Of all the things between the four corners of the land, what do you espy?

choices.title: The past, as faint as drizzle
Close your eyes, leaving only chaos

next.desc: With eyes shut and unseeing, even the truth shall become nothingness.

choices.title: Light it with stove fire
choices.desc: Have Hai-Shih Stove; toss Tongbao; if 1 Flower Coin is tossed, obtain 1 random Collectible

choices.title: Light it with wildfire
choices.desc: Have Hai-Shih Stove; toss Tongbao; if 1 Risk Coin is tossed, obtain 1 random Collectible

choices.title: Tianshi shakes mountains and shifts rivers

encounters.title: Liu'er
encounters.desc: Liu'er is a minor official at the Sui Regulator's Chamber of Geists, whose main duty is to analyze and conduct R&D on all sorts of geists and ceremonial devices for your party. She has pacified many waregeists, using them to further her exploration and renovation of the Garden to great effect. But as for actually using her inventions, which have received mixed reviews... You have your reservations. They always cost a pretty penny... Oh, she's here... What's that chunk of wood she's holding?

choices.title: Accept it
choices.desc: Lose half your Originium Ingots, but gain Collectible

next.desc: One person who once accepted one of Liu'er's geists goes blind during the day, while another could only taste garlic from then on. To avoid any potential disaster, you tactfully decline her offer.

On toss, Operators deployed on leftmost Vagary Tiles +100% DEF
Bloom: Becomes random Flower Coin when returning to Coffer after toss

On toss, Operators deployed on leftmost Vagary Tiles +60% ATK

On toss, all enemies -45% Max HP, but allies -25% Max HP

On toss, all Operators' ATK is shuffled at the start of battle

On toss, all allies +50% DEF and HP, but +5 DP Cost

items.name: Risk-Firestarter

On toss, all allies and enemies take 100 True damage per second, except allies on Vagary Tiles
Bloom: Becomes random Flower Coin when returning to Coffer after toss

+2 Max Life Points when added to Coffer. On toss, have more options in Safe House

On toss, obtain a unique Tactical Prop every battle

On toss, +3 Ingots and +1 Hope after each non-combat node

+30 Ingots when added to Coffer. On each toss, -10 Ingots

On toss, +1 Ingot for every 4 Ingots owned

items.name: Flower-The Bulwark

On toss, all allies +5% Max HP for every Objective Shield

Bloom: Becomes random Flower Coin when returning to Coffer after toss

items.name: Hsu-Hui

〔Acute〕 Operators of three random classes will deploy with a talisman attached the first time they are deployed
〔Awakened·Pacified〕 All [Apparitions] enemies take 1 damage every second
items.desc: Inscribed the eleventh, myriad scrolls in bloom. Enterest this hour, thy reward be talismans and seals.

items.name: Ssu-Nung
items.usage:

〔Clear〕 Operator DP Cost +3
〔Acute〕 Operator DP Cost +4

items.desc: Inscribed the sixth, grain and rice aplenty. Enterest this hour, thy belly be bloated and base.

items.name: Wu-Shang
items.usage:
〔Dim〕 Rogue Trader's prices of relatively Rare items are increased by 25%
〔Clear〕 Rogue Trader's prices are increased by 25%
〔Acute〕 Rogue Trader's prices are increased by 25%, with the price of relatively Rare items increased by 50%
〔Awakened·Pacified〕 Rogue Trader and Trade nodes have a chance for one random item to be 100% discounted
items.desc: Inscribed the seventh, awash in silken weave. Enterest this hour, thy cost knows no bounds.

items.name: Ch'ou-Mou

〔Clear〕 Have a 10% chance to lose 1 Life Point and Hope upon entering a noncombat node

〔Awakened·Pacified〕 Gain 1 Temporary Life Point at the beginning of each battle
items.desc: Inscribed the second, observant across the compass. Enterest this hour, thy steps be faltering and failing.

items.name: Wei-Chien

〔Clear〕 All allied Operators lose 20% Max SP when deployed

〔Clear〕 All allied Operators have a 10% chance to lose 30% Max HP when deployed

〔Acute〕 All Operators are harder to discern

〔Dim〕 For every Sui Operator on the battlefield, all Sui Operators recover 1 SP every 4s
〔Clear〕 For every Sui Operator on the battlefield, all Sui Operators recover 1 SP every 3s
〔Acute〕 For every Sui Operator on the battlefield, all Sui Operators recover 1 SP every 2s
〔Awakened·Pacified〕 For every Sui Operator on the battlefield, all Operators recover 1 SP every 3s
items.desc: Inscribed the twelfth, fragrant meals made promptly. Kin who entereth this hour, be sated and satisfied.
